series.name: SKULLPANDA|花瓣四幕系列
series.nameEn: SKULLPANDA|Petals in Four Acts Series Figures

figures.name: 时间里的花匠
figures.feel: 隐藏款！要听旋转的声音（很微弱）整体上下满几乎无空间，前后下部空间比较大，左右空间略小一点打盒点在中部（主要还是听声音）
figures.feelEn: Secret! Listen for the rotating sound (very faint). Full top/bottom with almost no space. Larger space at lower front/back, slightly smaller left/right with hitting point in the middle (mainly listen to the sound)

figures.name: 终章三重奏
figures.feel: 不重，前后满摇不动，上下略有一点空间，左右空间更大一些
figures.feelEn: Not heavy, full front/back unshakeable, slight space top/bottom, more space left/right

figures.name: 冠冕的余烬
figures.feel: 上下满，前后空间大砸盒，左右空间小只有轻微空间
figures.feelEn: Full top/bottom, large space front/back with banging, small space left/right with only slight space

figures.name: 枯败将至
figures.feel: 前后、左右都砸盒，上下晃娃卡住不动、只有卡片响
figures.feelEn: Banging front/back/left/right, doll stuck when shaking top/bottom, only card sound

figures.name: 哀婉的证词
figures.feel: 上下空间大，四周摇晃都有打盒的声音，但是都在上部打盒
figures.feelEn: Large top/bottom space, banging sound when shaking all sides, but all hitting at the top

figures.name: 溺水的花环
figures.feel: 很轻，六个面都打盒，但是一个侧面空间特别大，另一个侧面空间很小，对比很大，明盒
figures.feelEn: Very light, banging on all six sides, but one side has very large space and the other very small, big contrast, obvious box

figures.name: 褪色的天真
figures.feel: 六个面都砸盒打盒且有空间，还比较平均
figures.feelEn: Banging on all six sides with space, fairly even

figures.name: 灼烧的长夜
figures.feel: 六个面都满满的，略微一点空间，左右摇晃时有1个对点砸盒明显，但是没有凸出来，就是比较满的对顶的感觉
figures.feelEn: Full on all six sides with slight space, one obvious banging point when shaking left/right but not protruding, feels relatively full and pressing

figures.name: 献给誓约
figures.feel: 六个面都砸盒，前后空间最大，其他上下和前后空间略小一些
figures.feelEn: Banging on all six sides, largest space front/back, top/bottom and others slightly smaller

figures.name: 攀拥而上
figures.feel: 上下满摇不动，四周略有空间
figures.feelEn: Full top/bottom unshakeable, slight space all around

figures.name: 光的邀舞
figures.feel: 六面都略有点空间在撞击
figures.feelEn: Slight space on all six sides with hitting

figures.name: 精灵的把戏
figures.feel: 有配件，满，六面感觉都摇不太动，中间偏下部侧面有明显的对顶
figures.feelEn: Has accessories, full, all six sides feel hard to shake, obvious pressing at the lower middle side

figures.name: 待放的寓言
figures.feel: 很重的一个，四周都有略微砸盒的声音，上下无空间有袋子包装，感觉整只上下鼓鼓的
figures.feelEn: Very heavy, slight banging sound all around, no top/bottom space with bag packaging, feels bulging top/bottom

series.name: PUCKY|梦幻祈愿系列
series.note: 全系列全部单款均可亮灯
series.noteEn: All figures in the series can light up

figures.name: 隐藏款-早安
figures.feel: 隐藏款，暂无手感数据
figures.feelEn: Secret, no feel data yet

figures.name: 礼堂的祝福
figures.feel: 前后摇前后两面都是上部打盒重且基本听不到干燥剂声，左右摇右侧图解上部打盒重且听不到干燥剂声，上下摇主体不动且双卡上下打盒（小包干燥剂）
figures.feelEn: Front/back shake: heavy hitting at top of both sides with almost no desiccant sound. Left/right shake: heavy hitting at top right side with no desiccant sound. Top/bottom shake: body still, only double cards hitting (small desiccant pack)

figures.name: 月光小夜曲
figures.feel: 前后摇基本摇不动伴有较大干燥剂声，左右摇双卡打盒且干燥剂声较大，上下摇主体不动只有双卡打盒声（大包干燥剂）
figures.feelEn: Front/back shake: barely moves with loud desiccant sound. Left/right shake: double cards hitting with loud desiccant sound. Top/bottom shake: body still, only double cards hitting sound (large desiccant pack)

figures.name: 女巫特调
figures.feel: 前后摇前侧中部偏下轻度打盒，左右摇左侧下部轻度打盒并且干燥剂声大，上下摇主体基本不动配件和双卡打盒声且干燥剂声大（大包干燥剂）
figures.feelEn: Front/back shake: light hitting at lower middle front. Left/right shake: light hitting at lower left with loud desiccant sound. Top/bottom shake: body mostly still, accessories and double cards hitting with loud desiccant sound (large desiccant pack)

figures.name: 纺织天衣
figures.feel: 上下摇只有干燥剂声，左右摇左右两侧都是上部打盒重，前后摇前侧上部轻轻打盒伴有干燥剂声（大包干燥剂）
figures.feelEn: Top/bottom shake: only desiccant sound. Left/right shake: heavy hitting at top of both sides. Front/back shake: light hitting at top front with desiccant sound (large desiccant pack)

figures.name: 星光指挥家
figures.feel: 前后摇轻微晃动且均匀伴有干燥剂声，左右摇右侧图解上部打盒左侧上部打盒但偏散，上下摇主体不动只有干燥剂、配件、身份卡晃动声（大包干燥剂）
figures.feelEn: Front/back shake: slight even shaking with desiccant sound. Left/right shake: hitting at top of both sides but scattered on left. Top/bottom shake: body still, only desiccant, accessories and ID card shaking sound (large desiccant pack)

figures.name: 在逃公主
figures.feel: 前后摇后侧上部打盒重，左右摇主体不动只有双卡左右打盒，上下摇身份卡打盒伴有较大干燥剂声（大包干燥剂）
figures.feelEn: Front/back shake: heavy hitting at top back. Left/right shake: body still, only double cards hitting. Top/bottom shake: ID card hitting with loud desiccant sound (large desiccant pack)

figures.name: 烛光晚餐
figures.feel: 上下摇干燥剂声大且配件打盒，前后左右摇都是四个面上部打盒且整体晃动比较松散伴有较大干燥剂声（大包干燥剂）
figures.feelEn: Top/bottom shake: loud desiccant sound with accessory hitting. Front/back/left/right shake: hitting at top of all four sides with loose overall shaking and loud desiccant sound (large desiccant pack)

figures.name: 书海航行
figures.feel: 挑出整端最重的！前后摇前后两面都是上部打盒重且基本听不到干燥剂声，左右摇左右两侧上部打盒且配件打盒声大没有干燥剂声，上下摇双卡和配件一起打盒（小包干燥剂）
figures.feelEn: Pick the heaviest one! Front/back shake: heavy hitting at top of both sides with almost no desiccant sound. Left/right shake: hitting at top of both sides with loud accessory hitting and no desiccant sound. Top/bottom shake: double cards and accessories hitting together (small desiccant pack)

figures.name: 许愿星
figures.feel: 全系列最重的一只，上下轻微晃动底部碰盒，上下轻按有阻碍感，前后微微摇动，左右偏满，轻按有明显回弹感，内置塑料壳保护，整体大明盒
figures.feelEn: The heaviest in the series. Slight up-down shaking with bottom box-hitting, resistance when pressed up-down, slight front-back movement, left-right fairly full with obvious rebound when pressed. Built-in plastic shell protection, overall a big obvious box.

figures.name: 生机之兔
figures.feel: 上手偏沉，上下有空间晃动在底部打盒，四面都有空间，晃动在中部沉闷打盒，内置20g大包干燥剂
figures.feelEn: Feels heavy. Up-down has space with bottom box-hitting, all four sides have space with dull mid-section hitting. Contains 20g large desiccant pack.

figures.name: 智慧夜枭
figures.feel: 整体又沉又空，上下空间很大，晃动明显在底部打盒，四面都有空间，晃动在中部均匀打盒，内置20g大包干燥剂
figures.feelEn: Overall heavy and hollow. Large up-down space with obvious bottom box-hitting, all four sides have space with even mid-section hitting. Contains 20g large desiccant pack.

figures.name: 幸运瓢虫
figures.feel: 上下轻微晃动在底部碰盒，四面空间不大，摇不太动内置11g干燥剂
figures.feelEn: Slight up-down shaking with bottom box-touching, limited space on four sides, hard to shake. Contains 11g desiccant.

figures.name: 美丽之翼
figures.feel: 整体很空，六面空间都很大，上下晃动在底部砸盒，四面晃动中部均匀打盒
figures.feelEn: Overall very hollow. Large space on all six sides, up-down shaking hits bottom, four-side shaking hits evenly in middle.

figures.name: 友谊海伴
figures.feel: 整体偏满，上下轻微晃动，底部配件碰盒，四面空间不大，摇动能听见配件声
figures.feelEn: Overall fairly full. Slight up-down shaking with accessories hitting bottom, limited space on four sides, can hear accessories when shaking.

figures.name: 挚爱心箭
figures.feel: 上下有空间，晃动在底部碰盒，四面空间不大，对角线放置，内置塑料壳保护
figures.feelEn: Has up-down space with bottom box-hitting, limited space on four sides, placed diagonally. Built-in plastic shell protection.

figures.name: 新生莲花
figures.feel: 上下轻微晃动，配件在底部碰盒，四面都有空间，晃动在中部均匀打盒
figures.feelEn: Slight up-down shaking with accessories hitting bottom, all four sides have space with even mid-section hitting.

figures.name: 纯真雪语
figures.feel: 上手非常满，且轻按有明显泡沫的感觉，六面完全摇不动鼓鼓囊囊的，内置泡沫保护
figures.feelEn: Very full feeling, with obvious foam sensation when pressed. Completely immovable on all six sides, puffy feeling. Built-in foam protection.

figures.name: 守望石像
figures.feel: 上下轻微晃动在底部碰盒，四面都有空间，摇动都在中部均匀碰盒
figures.feelEn: Slight up-down shaking with bottom box-touching, all four sides have space with even mid-section hitting.

figures.name: 狮心之力
figures.feel: 整体又满又顶，上下摇不动，中部轻按有阻碍感，前后中部偏下位置轻按顶盒，左右中部轻按顶盒，有回弹感，内置塑料壳保护
figures.feelEn: Overall full and tight. Cannot shake up-down, resistance in middle when pressed, front-back lower-middle presses against box, left-right middle presses against box with rebound. Built-in plastic shell protection.

figures.name: 鎏金祝福
figures.feel: 上下轻微晃动，中部轻按有阻碍感，四面空间不大，轻微晃动，内置塑料壳保护
figures.feelEn: Slight up-down shaking, resistance in middle when pressed, limited space on four sides with slight movement. Built-in plastic shell protection.

figures.name: 自由白羽
figures.feel: 全系列最轻的一只，上下摇动在底部碰盒，四面晃动在中部打盒
figures.feelEn: The lightest in the series. Up-down shaking hits bottom, four-side shaking hits middle.

figures.name: 肉桂威士忌Gelato
figures.feel: 左右摇盒的时候在图鉴面第二行中间打盒明显，前后比较微打盒，打盒点在星星人的嘴巴位置
figures.feelEn: When shaking left and right, there is obvious box-hitting in the middle of the second row on the illustration side. Front and back has slight box-hitting. The hitting point is at the mouth position of Twinkle Twinkle.

figures.name: 草莓粉芭乐Gelato
figures.feel: 前后只有微微晃动的感觉，左右同样没空间只听到干燥剂声音
figures.feelEn: Front and back only has a slight swaying feeling. Left and right also has no space, only the sound of desiccant.

figures.name: 香芋紫薯冰Gelato
figures.feel: 前后左右空间不大，不过前后摇盒时候后面偏下有打盒感，这个要区分开来
figures.feelEn: Not much space front, back, left, or right. However, when shaking front and back, there is a box-hitting feeling at the lower back. This one needs to be distinguished.

figures.name: 绵绵独角兽Gelato
figures.feel: 左右空间不大右边有微微碰盒感，前后的话在星星人冰淇淋字母那里碰盒
figures.feelEn: Not much space left and right, with slight box-touching on the right side. Front and back hits at the ice cream letters of Twinkle Twinkle.

figures.name: 薄荷冰柠檬Gelato
figures.feel: 相对会满一些，而且前后左右都没打盒感只听到卡片和干燥剂声音，前后摇盒的话在后面偏下位置有轻微打盒感
figures.feelEn: Relatively fuller. No box-hitting feeling front, back, left or right - only hear card and desiccant sounds. When shaking front-back, there is slight box-hitting at the lower back position.

series.name: DIMOO|秘密话剧社系列
series.note: 重量差异蛮大，头部毛发不同手感也有差异

figures.name: 软软绵羊
figures.feel: 六面都只有一点点空间，微微空间晃动撞击的感觉，六面声音都很大，六面的声音空间都很平均，和其他只的撞击和空间感区别很大
figures.feelEn: There is only a little space on all six sides, and there is a slight shaking and impact feeling in the space. The sound on all six sides is very loud, and the sound space on all six sides is very average. It is very different from the impact and space feeling of other models.

figures.name: 墩墩企鹅
figures.feel: 上下空间特别大，砸盒声打盒声都有都大，反而前后左右几乎都没有打盒声，只有干燥剂摇晃声，并且也没有很明显的打盒撞击感，仅仅轻微晃动
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower space is very large, and the sound of boxes being smashed and the box being hit are loud. On the contrary, there is almost no box knocking sound from the front, rear, left, and right. There is only the sound of the desiccant shaking, and there is no obvious impact feeling of the box being hit, just a slight shaking.

figures.name: 迷宫兔
figures.feel: 六面空间都很大，前后会有明显金属圈撞击声，相对而言上下空间没那么大，被头顶撑起来了一点，左右摇晃也有很明显金属摇晃撞击的声音和感觉
figures.feelEn: The space on all six sides is very large, and there is an obvious sound of metal rings hitting the front and back. Relatively speaking, the upper and lower spaces are not that big. It is slightly propped up by the top of the head. There is also a clear sound and feeling of metal shaking and hitting when shaking left and right.

figures.name: 刺猬果
figures.feel: 左右空间很大很晃的感觉，干燥剂摇晃声音明显，上下有大空间会明显的打盒，但是前后很满只有一点空间的感觉
figures.feelEn: The left and right spaces feel very large and wobbly, and the desiccant shakes loudly. There is a big space above and below where the box is obviously packed, but the front and rear are very full and there is only a little space.

figures.name: 胆小狮
figures.feel: 上下空间大打盒明显，左右空间也有明显的打盒声，前后比较满，有明显干燥剂的声音微微晃动，娃全部略有一点空隙摇晃，但无声
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower spaces are large and the sound of boxing is obvious. There is also an obvious sound of boxing in the left and right spaces. The front and rear are relatively full. There is an obvious sound of desiccant shaking slightly. There is a slight gap in the baby's entire body, but there is no sound.

figures.name: 狼外婆
figures.feel: 整只比较重，上下好满但是有金属环的晃动声，左右摇晃有很明显的打盒声在上部，这只头部很扎实，前后空间小进金属环撞击感，这只很明显
figures.feelEn: The whole one is relatively heavy. It is quite full up and down, but there is a shaking sound of the metal ring. When shaking left and right, there is an obvious box-beating sound in the upper part. The head of this one is very solid, and the front and rear space is small. The impact of the metal ring is very obvious.

series.nameEn: DIMOO|The Secret Theatre Club Series Figures
series.noteEn: The weight difference is quite big, and the feel of the hair on the head is also different.

series.name: Hirono小野|温室芒草系列
series.note: 明盒很多

figures.name: 露营
figures.feel: 四周摇晃有明显卡片晃动感，没有娃打盒声，上下有小距离的空间有浅浅的撞击感
figures.feelEn: There is an obvious shaking feeling of cards when shaking around. There is no sound of the baby hitting the box. There is a slight impact feeling in the space with a small distance up and down.

figures.name: 过载
figures.feel: 整体也很满，上下完全无空间，四周只有很细微很细微的摇晃空间，就只有一点点
figures.feelEn: The whole thing is also very full, with no space at all above and below. There is only a very subtle shaking space around it, just a little bit.

figures.name: 逃离城市
figures.feel: 有配件，上下的头很高但是略有一点空间和干燥剂摇晃声，四周都有一些空间可以整只晃动，不太好辨别的感觉
figures.feelEn: There are accessories. The upper and lower heads are very high but there is a little space and the sound of the desiccant shaking. There is some space all around for the whole head to shake. It is not easy to distinguish.

figures.name: 循环
figures.feel: 满到直接顶出来，感觉盒子都要被撑爆了的感觉，左右直接顶到出来，上下前后也是满满的，好撑
figures.feelEn: It is so full that it can be pushed out immediately. It feels like the box is about to burst. It can be pushed out directly from the left and right sides. It is also full up and down, front and back, and it is easy to hold.

figures.name: 囚鸟
figures.feel: 完全毫无空间，毫无空间，毫无空间，不顶不突纯满
figures.feelEn: There is no space at all, no space, no space, no overturning, no overcoming, pure fullness

figures.name: 天注定
figures.feel: 有一个塑料壳保护，干燥剂很大在侧面，不顶不突起但是很满无空间
figures.feelEn: It is protected by a plastic shell. The desiccant is very large on the side. It is not protruding but is very full and has no space.

figures.name: 电脑人
figures.feel: 上下挺满的仅微微晃动，四周有空间但这只轻左右很满上部有一个小面有撞击感，前后空间大中间处有明显打盒
figures.feelEn: It is quite full up and down and only shakes slightly. There is space around it, but it is light and very full. There is a small surface on the upper part that feels like a bump. There is a lot of space at the front and rear, and there is an obvious box in the middle.

figures.name: 沉锚
figures.feel: 整只比较满，娃不太能摇动，只有干燥剂的声音，但是有顶盒，顶盒点在正面照片上方装饰处，不是娃本体顶，是娃带着袋子一起顶着很满的感觉
figures.feelEn: The whole thing is relatively full, and the baby can't shake it very well. There is only the sound of desiccant, but there is a top box. The top box is at the decorative point above the front photo. It is not the top of the baby itself, but the baby carrying the bag together. It feels very full.

figures.name: 消费清单
figures.feel: 左右摇晃时在底部声音比较大，六面摇晃感觉娃都很满毫无空间
figures.feelEn: When shaking from side to side, the sound at the bottom is louder. When shaking from six sides, the baby feels full and there is no space.

figures.name: 温水青蛙
figures.feel: 娃重，干燥剂也大，上下摇晃有空间但声音小但特别沉的闷声砸下来，四周摇晃都打盒且打盒点在偏下的部分一圈，这是好扎实，实心，中心在下部
figures.feelEn: The baby is heavy and the desiccant is large. There is room when shaking it up and down, but the sound is small but it makes a very deep muffled sound when it hits. The box is packed when it is shaken all around and the boxing point is in a circle at the lower part. It is very solid and solid, with the center at the lower part.

figures.name: 闲鱼罐头
figures.feel: 六面都是几乎摇不动仅微微一点点晃动感，但这只也是实心但是体积大，好重，但是重量分布感觉在中部多
figures.feelEn: It is almost motionless on all six sides and only slightly shakes. However, this one is solid but large and heavy, but the weight distribution feels more in the middle.

figures.name: 重缚
figures.feel: 六面都有空间撞击感，前后空间大，左右空间很小几乎没空间，上下摇晃卡片和娃娃都会打盒，声音很大
figures.feelEn: There is a sense of space impact on all six sides, the front and rear spaces are large, and the left and right spaces are very small and almost no space. Shaking the cards and dolls up and down will cause the box to break and the sound will be loud.

series.noteEn: There are many bright boxes

series.name: FARMER BOB|在农场中系列
series.note: 有很多明盒

figures.name: 仲夏夜之梦
figures.feel: 很奇怪的是这只还挺满的，但是倒不重，上下和前后很满，左右有空间会晃动
figures.feelEn: What’s strange is that this one is quite full, but it’s not heavy. It’s very full up and down and front and back, and it will wobble when there’s room left and right.

figures.name: 春日柠檬
figures.feel: 六面都很满娃摇不动，但是配重币特别晃在里面随便乱撞
figures.feelEn: The six sides are very full and the baby cannot shake them, but the counterweight coins are particularly dangling inside and can be bumped around at will.

figures.name: 去抓鱼吧
figures.feel: 上下一点点紧但是可以摇晃的动，并且配件会在轻轻撞击，四周摇晃只有明显的配重币撞击声，无其他声音
figures.feelEn: It is a little tight up and down but can be shaken, and the accessories will hit lightly. There is only an obvious knocking sound of the counterweight coins when shaking around, and no other sounds.

figures.name: 小麦的馈赠
figures.feel: 四周满（前后完全无空间，左右略有一点并且下部分很空），上下空间略有一点，会小范围轻轻的打盒
figures.feelEn: It is full on all sides (there is no space at the front and back, a little bit on the left and right and the lower part is very empty), there is a little space on the top and bottom, and it will be boxed lightly in a small area.

figures.name: 湖中朋友
figures.feel: 上下满，左右满，但是前后空间好大，好打盒，声音也很大，沉沉的
figures.feelEn: It's full up and down, full left and right, but the front and rear space is so big that it's easy to pack, and the sound is loud and heavy.

figures.name: 春雨协奏曲
figures.feel: 六面都有空间，六面打盒声音都特别大，空空的，撞击感很强很强
figures.feelEn: There is space on all six sides, and the sound of boxing on all six sides is very loud, empty, and the impact is very strong.

figures.name: 报恩萝卜
figures.feel: 很满，六面都是略有一点点空间，但是完全不顶，也几乎无声的感觉
figures.feelEn: It's very full, with a little space on all six sides, but it's not overwhelming at all, and it feels almost silent.

figures.name: 麦田守夜人
figures.feel: 娃的六面都很满，六面摇晃没有什么娃的撞击感，只有配重币在胡乱撞击的声音
figures.feelEn: All six sides of the baby are full, and there is no impact on the six sides of the baby. There is only the sound of the weight coins hitting randomly.

figures.name: 神秘来客
figures.feel: 六面全满，毫无空间，甚至连配重币都没有撞击感，很满
figures.feelEn: All six sides are full, there is no space, and even the counterweight coins have no impact. It is very full.

figures.name: 南瓜庆典
figures.feel: 有头罩所以显得体积很大，上下撞击声很强很大，四周也有空间但是声音和距离都略小一点点，四周摇晃时配重币会胡乱撞击
figures.feelEn: There is a hood, so it looks very bulky, and the sound of up and down collisions is very loud. There is space around, but the sound and distance are slightly smaller. The counterweight coins will hit randomly when the surroundings are shaken.

figures.name: 隐藏款-春巡
figures.feel: 特别重，特别满，完完全全的明盒，左右两边直接对顶到凸出来，109%明盒，无声
figures.feelEn: Very heavy, very full, completely exposed box, the left and right sides are directly facing each other until they protrude, 109% exposed box, silent

figures.name: 小羊的生日
figures.feel: 娃也卡住不动，但是配重币在里面胡乱撞声音很大，侧面也有对顶，直接顶出来满满的
figures.feelEn: The baby is also stuck, but the sound of the counterweight coins banging randomly inside is very loud. There are also counter-tops on the sides, and it comes out full of weights.

series.noteEn: There are many bright boxes
series.nameEn: FARMER BOB|On the Farm Series Figures

series.name: MOLLY|沿途的风景二十周年系列

figures.name: 看着你
figures.feel: 上下满，无空间，不顶盒；但是四周都有空间并且撞击声大，撞击点在下方四分之一处，左右声音比前后声音大
figures.feelEn: Full top and bottom, no space, no top box; but there is space all around and the impact sound is loud. The impact point is at the bottom quarter, and the left and right sounds are louder than the front and rear sounds.

figures.name: 城堡外的星星
figures.feel: 四周满满的没有空间，但是上下空间很大，直接上下苦苦打盒很明显
figures.feelEn: There is no space all around, but there is a lot of space up and down. It is obvious when you are struggling to open the box directly up and down.

figures.name: 一起听打雷
figures.feel: 四周摇晃时有很明显的撞击感，上部特别空，下部空间略小一点，上下也不满不顶，前后上部有苦苦打盒在封面字母N这个地方一个点很明显
figures.feelEn: There is an obvious impact when shaking around. The upper part is particularly empty, the lower space is slightly smaller, and the upper and lower parts are not full. There is a hard knock box on the front and upper parts. A dot is obvious at the letter N on the cover.

figures.name: 花花世界
figures.feel: 上下略有一点点空间，在前后会有一个点很清脆的声音，左右几乎没什么空间，只有微微晃动的感觉
figures.feelEn: There is a little space up and down, and there is a very clear sound in the front and rear. There is almost no space left and right, and there is only a slight shaking feeling.

figures.name: 我的国度
figures.feel: 上下摇晃时干燥剂和卡片的声音很明显，整体晃动感不强，四周有小空间碰撞并且摇晃时是上部在打盒，尤其是上部的后面的点比较明显
figures.feelEn: The sound of desiccant and card is very obvious when shaking up and down. The overall shaking feeling is not strong. There is a small space around the collision. When shaking, the upper part is playing the box, especially the point behind the upper part is more obvious.

figures.name: 抱你入睡
figures.feel: 六面都有空间，在下部分空间很大有空空的撞击感，侧面打盒出处在1/2~1/6处打盒
figures.feelEn: There is space on all six sides, and the lower part has a large space with an empty impact feel. The side box is boxed at 1/2~1/6.

figures.name: 童年森林
figures.feel: 上下稳几乎没有空间，四周有空间并且有清脆的撞击声，撞击点在中部稍偏下一点点的地方，不是特别明显
figures.feelEn: There is almost no space for the upper and lower sides. There is space all around and there is a crisp impact sound. The impact point is slightly lower in the middle and is not particularly obvious.

figures.name: 我是蜂子
figures.feel: 上下空间有并有明显撞击声，四周摇晃有轻微和塑料壳撞击的声音，但是没有和盒子的撞击声，还是比较明显的感觉
figures.feelEn: There is an obvious impact sound in the upper and lower spaces. There is a slight impact sound with the plastic case when the surroundings are shaking, but there is no impact sound with the box, which is still quite obvious.

figures.name: 红顶小屋
figures.feel: 六面都有空间，上下空间比四周大很多并且撞击声也很大，四周正中间处打盒明显，轻轻转动摇晃时有很清脆的打盒声
figures.feelEn: There is space on all six sides. The upper and lower spaces are much larger than those on the four sides, and the impact sound is also loud. There is obvious boxing in the middle of the four sides, and there is a very clear boxing sound when gently turned and shaken.

series.name: DIMOO|瞬间的奇遇系列
series.note: 明盒多

figures.name: 它住在靴子里
figures.feel: 也很满，没有顶点和撞击，也是细微的松动和干燥剂的声音，就比较轻了
figures.feelEn: It is also very full, there are no peaks or impacts, there is also slight loosening and the sound of desiccant, it is relatively light.

figures.name: 带我去远方
figures.feel: 上下和前后空间很大，前后打盒点在下部分，空空的声音很大有闷闷的撞击声和撞击感，但是左右空间明显比前后小，也有小的撞击声
figures.feelEn: There is a lot of space up and down and front and rear. The front and rear boxing points are in the lower part. The sound of the empty space is loud and there is a dull impact sound and a sense of impact. However, the left and right spaces are obviously smaller than the front and rear spaces, and there are also small impact sounds.

figures.name: 头顶春天
figures.feel: 底座是分开的，六面都只有微微的晃动感，干燥剂松动声也有，但是六面都没有明显的空间和撞击感
figures.feelEn: The base is separated, and there is only a slight shaking feeling on the six sides. There is also the sound of the desiccant loosening, but there is no obvious feeling of space or impact on the six sides.

figures.name: 吹响春天
figures.feel: 重量集中在中部，六面都有一点空间细微晃动，没有其他明显的感觉（这只有底座比较占空间）
figures.feelEn: The weight is concentrated in the middle, and there is a slight shaking of space on the six sides, but there is no other obvious feeling (only the base takes up more space)

figures.name: 打包春天
figures.feel: 六面都有空间并且有撞击感，六面空间都比较大比较平均，感觉这套六面有空间的很少了
figures.feelEn: There is space on all six sides and there is a sense of impact. The spaces on the six sides are relatively large and average. I feel that there are very few in this set of six sides with space.

figures.name: 坠入花海
figures.feel: 上下略有空间可以整只晃动，但是四周只有松动感没有撞击感，空间很细微，前后摇晃时封面云宝宝嘴巴处有明显晃动感
figures.feelEn: There is a slight space up and down to allow the whole thing to shake, but there is only a sense of looseness around it and no impact. The space is very small. When shaking back and forth, there is an obvious shaking feeling at the cover of Baby Cloud's mouth.

figures.name: 捕捉春天
figures.feel: 六面有明显卡片和干燥剂撞击的声音，娃只有前后略有一点空间，这是卡片的撞击感是特别明显的
figures.feelEn: There are obvious sounds of cards and desiccant hitting each other on the six sides. There is only a little space at the front and back. This is where the impact of the cards is particularly obvious.

figures.name: 吹一口花香
figures.feel: 配件一个球形，可以直接盒里小范围内胡乱撞击，相反娃没有什么声音和撞击
figures.feelEn: The accessory is spherical and can be hit randomly in a small area directly in the box. On the contrary, there is no sound or impact.

figures.name: 抱紧春天
figures.feel: 上下略有一丝摇晃，前后封面左边黑球处可以直接顶出来，左右空间大有明显撞击感，感觉是明盒
figures.feelEn: There is a slight sway up and down. The black ball on the left side of the front and rear covers can be pushed out directly. There is a clear sense of impact in the left and right spaces. It feels like a bright box.

figures.name: 被春天接住
figures.feel: 有直接顶盒，前后对顶，在封面裤子和椅子连接处，直接前后对顶，四周也比较满只有细微松动和干燥剂声音
figures.feelEn: There is a direct top box, front and rear facing each other, and the connection between the cover pants and the chair is directly front and rear facing each other. The surroundings are relatively full, with only slight looseness and desiccant sound.

figures.name: 春天的后坐力
figures.feel: 又是前后对顶，但是有两处都是前后对顶，两处分别在封面裤子下面线的前后处，很明显
figures.feelEn: The front and back are facing each other again, but there are two places where the front and back are facing each other. The two places are on the front and back of the bottom line of the cover pants, which is obvious.

figures.name: 飞过春天
figures.feel: 上下满，只有中间部分撞击，前后轻微撞击感在下部，左右撞击有那种dongdong的清脆声音
figures.feelEn: The top and bottom are full, only the middle part hits, the front and rear slightly hits at the lower part, and the left and right hits have that crisp sound of dongdong.

series.noteEn: Many bright boxes

series.name: LABUBU THE MONSTERS|三丽鸥家族搪胶毛绒挂件系列
series.nameEn: LABUBU THE MONSTERS|Sanrio Hello Kitty and Friends Series Figures
series.note: 普款凯蒂猫和隐藏款凯蒂猫均为整系列里最轻最灵动的！干燥剂10g大包的为隐藏款！干燥剂3g或5g的是普款凯蒂猫！薄卡为普款凯蒂猫！厚卡为隐藏款凯蒂猫！
series.noteEn: Regular Hello Kitty and Secret Hello Kitty are the lightest in the series! 10g desiccant = Secret! 3g or 5g desiccant = Regular Hello Kitty! Thin card = Regular! Thick card = Secret!

figures.name: 经典凯蒂猫
figures.feel: 隐藏款！挑台面轻的，151g-154g，上下半指，前后左右空间大，唯一大包干燥剂10g，唯一厚卡，卡片声音比普卡重。总结：轻！灵动！大干燥剂！厚卡！
figures.feelEn: Secret! Pick the lightest one, 151g-154g, half finger space top/bottom, large space front/back/left/right, only one with 10g desiccant pack, only thick card. Summary: Light! Agile! Big desiccant! Thick card!

figures.name: 凯蒂猫
figures.feel: 热款！147.3g-151.4g，上下满，前后半指到一指，左右一指半，干燥剂3.5g或5.6g
figures.feelEn: Hot! 147.3g-151.4g, full top/bottom, half to one finger front/back, 1.5 fingers left/right, desiccant 3.5g or 5.6g

figures.name: 美乐蒂
figures.feel: 152.7g/148.9g，上下满，左右半指到一指，前后半指到两指，干燥剂5.3g或5.0g
figures.feelEn: 152.7g/148.9g, full top/bottom, half to one finger left/right, half to two fingers front/back, desiccant 5.3g or 5.0g

figures.name: 酷洛米
figures.feel: 152.1g/154.2g，上下满，前后半指，左右一指，干燥剂3.3g或5.4g
figures.feelEn: 152.1g/154.2g, full top/bottom, half finger front/back, one finger left/right, desiccant 3.3g or 5.4g

figures.name: 布丁狗
figures.feel: 163.2g/161.9g，上下满，左右半指，前后半指，耳朵填充物类似干燥剂颗粒仔细摇能摇出来，颗粒物比大耳狗多一些，干燥剂3.3g
figures.feelEn: 163.2g/161.9g, full top/bottom, half finger left/right, half finger front/back, ear filling similar to desiccant granules can be shaken out, more granules than Cinnamoroll, desiccant 3.3g

figures.name: 帕恰狗
figures.feel: 153.2g/153.9g，上下不到半指，前后半指到一指，左右一指到满，左右能感觉娃手在中间硬打盒，干燥剂5.1g或5.3g
figures.feelEn: 153.2g/153.9g, less than half finger top/bottom, half to one finger front/back, one finger to full left/right, can feel the doll hand hitting hard in the middle left/right, desiccant 5.1g or 5.3g

figures.name: 大耳狗
figures.feel: 158.5g/160.0g，上下半指，左右半指，前后满，耳朵里有类似干燥剂颗粒填充物，比布丁狗填充的少一点，干燥剂5.6g或5.3g
figures.feelEn: 158.5g/160.0g, half finger top/bottom, half finger left/right, full front/back, ear has desiccant-like granule filling, less than Pompompurin, desiccant 5.6g or 5.3g

series.name: 小甜豆|追光记忆系列
series.note: 有一些明盒，但也有一些都是满满的不好分辨

figures.name: 心意日
figures.feel: 六面也是满的，但是上下摇晃有明显的小包干燥剂在晃动，并且有卡片撞击，但这只很大所以卡的满满的
figures.feelEn: The six sides are also full, but when you shake it up and down, there are obvious packets of desiccant shaking, and there are cards hitting it, but this one is very big, so it is full of cards.

figures.name: 游乐日
figures.feel: 六面都细微有一点点空间，摇晃感很轻很小，仅上下的晃动感明显一点点
figures.feelEn: There is a little space on all six sides, and the shaking feeling is very light and small. Only the up and down shaking feeling is a little obvious.

figures.name: 派对日
figures.feel: 虽然不大但是有塑料壳保护整只，所以也特别满，但是却有细微的松动感，不是撞击感，还能听到一点点塑料壳和纸盒的撞击感，很轻微
figures.feelEn: Although it is not big, it has a plastic case to protect the whole thing, so it is very full. However, there is a slight loose feeling, not an impact feeling. You can also hear a little impact of the plastic case and the carton, which is very slight.

figures.name: 庆祝日
figures.feel: 六面完全毫无空间，完全摇不动，很满但很轻
figures.feelEn: There is absolutely no space on the six sides, it cannot be moved at all, it is full but very light.

figures.name: 美梦日
figures.feel: 上下空间特别大，苦苦撞击，左右空间小，只有晃动感，但是前后有明显的撞击声空间比左右大很多
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower spaces are extremely large, and the impact is hard. The left and right spaces are small, and there is only a sense of shaking, but there is an obvious impact sound at the front and rear. The space is much larger than the left and right spaces.

figures.name: 许愿日
figures.feel: 上下空间特别大，特别砸盒，左右空间大并且撞击感强烈，前后几乎只有晃动感
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower spaces are particularly large, especially when smashing the box. The left and right spaces are large and the impact is strong. There is almost only a shaking feeling in the front and rear.

figures.name: 纪念日
figures.feel: 上空下满，仅上部有卡片和干燥剂可以摇晃有撞击感，下部完完全全卡住毫无空间没有晃动感
figures.feelEn: The upper part is empty and the lower part is full. Only the upper part has cards and desiccant and can shake and feel a bump. The lower part is completely stuck with no space and no shaking feeling.

figures.name: 表演日
figures.feel: 配件很多很大，导致空间被撑满，完全无空间，毫无间隙，没有任何晃动的感觉和空间，也没有干燥剂声音
figures.feelEn: There are many and large accessories, which fills up the space. There is no space at all, no gaps, no shaking feeling or space, and no sound of desiccant.

figures.name: 表白日
figures.feel: 前后空间很大砸盒明显，砸盒点在封面字母E处，上下左右略有一点空间，不是非常明显
figures.feelEn: There is a lot of space at the front and back, and the box smashing point is obvious. The box smashing point is at the letter E on the cover. There is a little space up and down, left and right, but it is not very obvious.

figures.name: 惊喜日
figures.feel: 全满，因为这只有塑料壳保护前方，只有干燥剂的声音，毫无空间毫无娃的撞击感
figures.feelEn: It’s completely full, because there’s only a plastic shell protecting the front, there’s only the sound of desiccant, there’s no space, and there’s no baby’s impact.

figures.name: 幸运日
figures.feel: 上下空间大，有闷闷砸盒声，四周左右空间比前后大
figures.feelEn: The space above and below is large, there is a muffled sound of boxes being smashed, and the space on the left and right sides is larger than the front and rear spaces.

figures.name: 冒险日
figures.feel: 四周空间大撞击明显，上下有空间并且一个点在苦苦打盒，声音大，又重声音又大
figures.feelEn: There is a big impact in the surrounding space, there is space above and below, and one point is struggling to hit the box, the sound is loud, heavy and loud

series.noteEn: There are some clear boxes, but there are also some boxes that are full and difficult to distinguish.
series.nameEn: Sweet Bean|Days of Sparkles Series Figures

series.name: Merodi|放学后系列

figures.name: 池塘小王子
figures.feel: 上下几乎不怎么打盒打盒，但是四周打盒砸盒空间大，不过声音不是很大
figures.feelEn: There is almost no boxing or boxing at the top or bottom, but there is plenty of room for boxing and boxing around, but the sound is not very loud.

figures.name: 零食大盗
figures.feel: 很轻，六面疯狂砸盒打盒，上下感觉一个顶快要砸出来，特别打盒
figures.feelEn: It's very light. I smashed the box crazily on all six sides. It felt like one of the tops was about to come out. Especially when I hit the box.

figures.name: 客厅漫游
figures.feel: 四周满，毫无空间，有塑料壳保护完全卡住
figures.feelEn: It's all around, no space at all, it's protected by a plastic case and is completely stuck.

figures.name: 忘记浇水啦!
figures.feel: 上下空间巨大，沉沉砸盒打盒，四周也有空间但没上下单，也很明显
figures.feelEn: The space above and below is huge, and it’s obvious that boxes are being smashed and smashed. There is space around but there is no place to place orders.

figures.name: 一起跳舞吧
figures.feel: 六面空间不算很大，略微有一点打盒感，打盒点也在中部，很长条状的一只娃
figures.feelEn: The space on the six sides is not very large, and it has a slightly boxy feel. The boxing point is also in the middle, and it looks like a very long doll.

figures.name: 老师看不见我
figures.feel: 中间很重一个点在打盒，六面打盒声音很大，感觉要掉出来，打盒点在正中间
figures.feelEn: There is a very heavy point in the middle when the box is being opened. The sound of the box being opened on the six sides is very loud and it feels like it will fall out. The boxing point is in the middle.

figures.name: 美食之旅
figures.feel: 有配件所以比较满，四周漫无空间，上下略有一点空间浅浅闷闷打盒
figures.feelEn: There are accessories, so it's quite full. There's no space around it, and there's just a little space above and below. It's a bit boring to pack.

figures.name: 等等我
figures.feel: 六面都有空间，晃动砸盒声音大，整只是长条形，没有胡乱晃动，一整只条状物在六面撞击
figures.feelEn: There is space on all six sides, and the sound of shaking the box is loud. It is just a long strip, and there is no random shaking. The whole strip hits the six sides.

figures.name: 咔嚓!笑一个!
figures.feel: 也是六面砸盒，但是四周空间比上下空间大盒很多，声音也很大
figures.feelEn: It is also a six-sided smashing box, but the surrounding space is much larger than the upper and lower spaces, and the sound is also loud.

figures.name: 吓到你啦!
figures.feel: 六面都有哦脆脆的打盒感，打盒点在中上部分一圈，同样的高度，摇晃时能听到罩子和娃碰撞的声音
figures.feelEn: All six sides have a crispy boxing feel. The boxing point is in a circle at the middle and upper part, at the same height. When shaking, you can hear the sound of the cover and the baby colliding.

figures.name: 作业再说吧
figures.feel: 六面都打盒，头轻较重，底部是一个平面完完全全平平的在底部撞击，很特别的手感
figures.feelEn: The box is boxed on all six sides, the head is light and heavy, and the bottom is a flat surface that is completely flat when hit at the bottom. It has a very special feel.

figures.name: 再玩5分钟
figures.feel: 重，上下满，但是四周摇晃有空间在上部，轻微晃动
figures.feelEn: Heavy, full from top to bottom, but shakes all around, there is room at the top, shakes slightly

series.nameEn: Merodi|Chapter 1 – Merodi After School Series Figures

figures.name: 答案
figures.feel: 卡片在上下胡乱晃动，头部空间很大导致四周摇晃的时候很紧没有空间，上下也很满感觉被包装袋卡住整只
figures.feelEn: The card is shaking randomly up and down. There is a lot of room for the head, so when it is shaken around, it is tight and there is no space. It is also full up and down, and it feels like the whole card is stuck by the packaging bag.

figures.name: 选择
figures.feel: 虽然轻，但是头部配件有泡沫保护，直接把空间卡住了，六面完全卡住完全不动，不知道是不是特例，如果不是特例就是明盒
figures.feelEn: Although it is light, the head accessories are protected by foam, which directly blocks the space. The six sides are completely stuck and completely motionless. I don’t know if this is a special case. If not, it is an open box.

figures.name: 心思
figures.feel: 比较高但是并不顶，上下略有一点空间打盒，前后可以胡乱打盒，打盒点在很偏下的地方，左右空间却很小
figures.feelEn: It is relatively high but not top-heavy. There is a little space for boxing up and down. You can box it randomly in the front and rear. The boxing point is very low, but there is very little space left and right.

figures.name: 加速
figures.feel: 虽然轻，上下只有卡片的声音，四周都有轻微撞击，声音集中在下方四分之一处，不好分辨
figures.feelEn: Although it is light, there is only the sound of the card above and below, and there are slight impacts on all sides. The sound is concentrated in the lower quarter, making it difficult to distinguish.

figures.name: 长发
figures.feel: 上下空间很大并且砸盒沉沉的，打盒明显；四周感觉也是在偏底部的地方有明显打盒声
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower space is very large and the box is heavy and the box is obvious; the surrounding area also feels that there is an obvious sound of the box being hit at the bottom.

figures.name: 玩伴
figures.feel: 坐姿很矮，所以上下空间特别大，但是砸盒声不大，四周也可以胡乱摇晃打盒，尤其左右特别特别空的明显可以乱晃
figures.feelEn: The sitting position is very short, so the space up and down is very large, but the sound of smashing boxes is not loud, and you can shake the boxes around randomly, especially the left and right ones that are particularly empty can obviously be shaken around.

figures.name: 出击
figures.feel: 四周有空间晃动但是却很小撞击声，四周的中部偏下部分感觉会稍微的卡住一点，应该是拳击侧放导致，上下有空间且有明显的撞击声撞击感
figures.feelEn: There is space shaking around but there is little impact sound. The middle and lower part of the surrounding area feels a little stuck. It should be caused by boxing on the side. There is space up and down and there is an obvious impact sound.

figures.name: 恶作剧
figures.feel: 六面空间都很大，都特别砸盒，声音也很大，细长尖尖的一只感觉
figures.feelEn: The space on all six sides is very large, and the boxes are all smashed very loudly. The sound is also very loud, and the one with a slender and pointed feel

figures.name: 诱饵
figures.feel: 六面仅仅特别特别细微细微的空间，六面都是一点点空间微微晃动，无别的感觉
figures.feelEn: The six sides are just very, very subtle spaces. The six sides are all a little bit of space shaking slightly, and there is no other feeling.

figures.name: 失衡
figures.feel: 有两包特别大的干燥剂竖着放导致很满很满毫无空间，仅有细微的松动感
figures.feelEn: Two particularly large packages of desiccant were placed vertically, causing them to be very full with no space and only a slight sense of looseness.

figures.name: 独处
figures.feel: 特别重，但是上下只有空间可以晃动的，四周还有明显的打盒声，可以和等待区分开
figures.feelEn: It's extremely heavy, but there's only room for it to swing up and down, and there's an obvious sound of box beating all around, which can be distinguished from waiting.

figures.name: 等待
figures.feel: 特别重扎实的一个，干燥剂很小，六面完全摇不动，无声音，仅有细微的卡片碰撞声
figures.feelEn: A particularly heavy and solid one. The desiccant is very small and cannot be shaken at all from six sides. There is no sound except for the slight sound of card collision.

series.name: SKULLPANDA|小马宝莉系列
series.note: 难度很高，重量手感上只有细微的差别，没有明盒

figures.name: 碧琪
figures.feel: 稍微轻一些的一只，依旧上下空间大闷闷的砸盒但是声音小，很难分辨，就是轻一点
figures.feelEn: The slightly lighter one still has a large upper and lower space, but the sound is small and difficult to distinguish, so it is lighter.

figures.name: 珍奇
figures.feel: 算最特别的因为有一个独角，前面有一个点摇晃时会打盒，上下依旧空间大但是闷闷的声音小
figures.feelEn: The most special thing is that it has a single horn, and there is a point in the front that will hit the box when it is shaken. There is still a lot of space up and down, but the muffled sound is small.

figures.name: 紫悦
figures.feel: 也有独角，前面偏上部分撞击有一个点会打盒，四周摇晃时左右面耳球撞击的感觉很明显，上下空间大但是声音很小，闷闷重重的撞击感
figures.feelEn: There is also a unicorn. There is a point on the upper part of the front that will knock the box. When the left and right ear balls are shaken around, the impact of the left and right ear balls is obvious. The upper and lower spaces are large but the sound is very small, and there is a dull and heavy impact.

figures.name: 柔柔
figures.feel: 真的感觉不到有什么差别，还是上下空间大，闷闷的重重的，但是声音几乎没有，四周摇晃有挂件碰撞声
figures.feelEn: I really can't feel any difference. There is still a lot of space up and down, and it's a bit muffled, but there's almost no sound. There's the sound of pendants clinking around when shaking.

figures.name: 苹果嘉儿
figures.feel: 四周摇晃有明显挂件撞击声，上下空间很大，很沉重的砸盒感
figures.feelEn: There is an obvious banging sound when the pendant is shaking around. There is a lot of space up and down, and it feels like a heavy box being smashed.

figures.name: 云宝
figures.feel: 头发略短一点，手感上没有明显差异，但感觉脚底部会扎实一点，闷闷的，毕竟有袜套
figures.feelEn: The hair is slightly shorter, and there is no obvious difference in feel, but the soles of the feet feel a little firmer and stuffier, after all, they have socks.

series.noteEn: The difficulty is very high, there is only a slight difference in weight and feel, and there is no clear box.

series.name: POP MART|点金奔腾系列
series.note: 有一些很好分辨，但是中间重量的很多，所以还是有些难度

figures.name: 天马行空
figures.feel: 上下空间很大，四周反而几乎摇不动只有干燥剂摇晃的声音
figures.feelEn: There is a lot of space up and down, and the surroundings are almost motionless except for the sound of the desiccant shaking.

figures.name: 星星人 星梦迎春
figures.feel: 有塑料壳保护娃，六面都有空间并且打盒非常响，声音很大，很实心的感觉
figures.feelEn: There is a plastic shell to protect the baby. There is space on all six sides and the box is very loud. The sound is very loud and it feels very solid.

figures.name: HACIPUPU 祥云纳福
figures.feel: 六面全满，毫无空间，完全摇不动，无声音

figures.name: TinyTiny马到春禧

figures.feelEn: It is full from top to bottom, and there is a slight space and boxing sound in the lower part when shaking around.

figures.name: SKULLPANDA 驭长风
figures.feel: 完完全全满，毫无声音，毫无空间

figures.name: MOLLY 金运摇来

figures.name: CHAKA 报春驹
figures.feel: 仅上下有细微空间，四周全满

figures.name: MOLLY 收款马
figures.feel: 六面可以乱晃乱撞，空间都比较大

figures.feel: 六面空间大，可以整只娃娃六面晃动有声音，空间大，应该是毛不那么满的原因

figures.feel: 是两个部分分开装，六面微微松动有一点撞击的小声音
figures.feelEn: The two parts are installed separately. The six sides are slightly loose and there is a small knocking sound.

figures.name: 姜饼小熊
figures.feel: 很轻感觉空空的，上下略有空间轻砸盒声，四周胡乱砸盒声音特别大

figures.name: 琥珀冻的密谋

figures.name: 双生的制衡

figures.name: 红酒的倾洒

figures.name: 方糖的落跑

figures.name: 蛋杯的迷藏

figures.feelEn: When shaking from all sides, the boxing point is in the middle (skirt). There is a slight space up and down and there is a boxing sound. When shaking up and down, it feels like the weight is concentrated in the middle part.

figures.name: 林间的帽子
figures.feel: 上下很空打盒，四周也略有空间摇晃也有撞击感，整只集中在一起一个中心的感觉
figures.feelEn: The top and bottom of the box are very empty, and the surrounding space is slightly shaking and has a sense of impact. It feels like the whole thing is gathered together in one center.

figures.name: 有鸟飞过屋顶
figures.feel: 四周无空间很满，上下摇晃时感觉是一个大整体在细微整体晃动，感觉也是撑的很满的一只
figures.feelEn: There is no space around it and it is very full. When it shakes up and down, it feels like a large whole body is shaking slightly. It also feels like it is very full.

figures.name: 借力生长
figures.feel: 很重但是空间很大，四周特别打盒，底座单独装会有明显撞击声声音比较杂，上下也很打盒声音大空间不小
figures.feelEn: It's heavy but has a lot of space. It's packed with boxes all around. If the base is installed alone, there will be an obvious impact sound and the sound will be messy. The sound of boxing is also loud and the space is not small.

series.name: Zoraa|三丽鸥漫游美好时光系列

figures.name: 帕恰狗-派送美梦
figures.feel: 上下空间特别大很砸盒，四周也特别砸盒，整只是瘦瘦高高的样子六面都很晃动砸砸的
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower spaces are extremely large and the boxes are very smashed, and the surrounding boxes are also extremely smashed. The whole body is very thin and tall, and the six sides are shaken and smashed.

figures.name: 凯蒂猫-烘焙甜心
figures.feel: 四周摇不动，上下娃一点空间但是干燥剂声音特别大
figures.feelEn: It can't be moved around, and there's a little space for the baby to move up and down, but the desiccant is very loud.

figures.name: 酷洛米-酷萌宝贝
figures.feel: 两大包干燥剂，六面空间都很大六面感觉特别空，尤其是四周有特别大的空间
figures.feelEn: There are two large bags of desiccant, and the six sides have a lot of space. The six sides feel very empty, especially when there is a huge space around them.

figures.name: 布丁狗-分享饼干
figures.feel: 六面纹丝不动，四周都很满比较大只，重量集中在下部
figures.feelEn: The six sides are motionless, and the four sides are full. It is relatively large, and the weight is concentrated on the lower part.

figures.name: 酷洛米-甜想时光
figures.feel: 两大包干燥剂，左右上部特别打盒，上下很沉砸盒但是没有打盒声，前后也不打盒有很大的干燥剂声音
figures.feelEn: There are two large packages of desiccant. The left and right upper parts are specially packaged. The boxes are very heavy when they are knocked up and down, but there is no sound of the packages being packaged. There is also a loud desiccant sound when the boxes are not packaged in the front and rear.

figures.name: 美乐蒂-花园物语
figures.feel: 两包干燥剂侧放，上下摇娃不动且有点顶但是干燥剂声音很大，前后纹丝不动左右略有空间轻微打盒
figures.feelEn: The two packs of desiccant are placed on their sides. They cannot be shaken up and down and have a slight roof. However, the desiccant makes a loud sound. There is no movement in the front and back, and there is a slight space left and right. The box is slightly opened.

figures.name: 人鱼汉顿-捣蛋计划
figures.feel: 左右有明显配件和娃和盒子互相碰撞的声音，前后只有娃撞的小声音，但是上下空间没有撞击声只有闷闷的一点砸盒声
figures.feelEn: There are obvious sounds of accessories and the collision of the baby and the box on the left and right. There is only a small sound of the baby hitting the front and back, but there is no collision sound in the upper and lower spaces, only a muffled sound of the box being smashed.

figures.name: 帕恰狗-郊游时间
figures.feel: 一大一小两包干燥剂，上下干燥剂声音很清晰，前后无空间左右上部略微打盒，整体因为干燥剂活动的空间比较小
figures.feelEn: There are two packs of desiccant, one large and one small. The sound of the upper and lower desiccants is very clear. There is no space in the front and rear. The left and right upper parts are slightly boxed. Overall, the space for the desiccant to move is relatively small.

figures.name: 大耳狗-融融冬日
figures.feel: 明盒！没有配件没有干燥剂，上下完全摇不动只有卡片的声音，上下有一个面会鼓鼓满满的，四面摇有偏上部有一个侧面打盒特别特别响多点打盒
figures.feelEn: Ming box! There are no accessories and no desiccant. It can’t be shaken up and down at all. There is only the sound of cards. One of the top and bottom sides will be full of bulges. When it is shaken from four sides, there is a side boxing on the upper side that is very loud. The multi-point boxing is very loud.

series.nameEn: Zoraa|Baby Zoraa X Sanrio Characters Having a Good Time Series Figures

series.name: LABUBU THE MONSTERS|海贼王联名系列

figures.name: 蒙奇·D·路飞
figures.feel: 六面空间都特别大特别砸，左右空间特别大也很砸盒，打盒的点很明显在中间处
figures.feelEn: The spaces on the six sides are extremely large and smashed. The left and right spaces are extremely large and box-breaking. The point of box-breaking is obviously in the middle.

figures.name: 罗罗诺亚·佐罗
figures.feel: 坐着的所以上下空间很大，前后左右都能晃动，底座是没有卡扣的所以可以明显将底座晃动撞击其他几乎都很难有这么清脆的声音，明盒
figures.feelEn: There is a lot of space up and down because of the sitting position, and it can rock back and forth, left and right, and the base has no buckles, so you can obviously shake the base and hit it, which is almost impossible to produce such a crisp sound. Ming box

figures.name: 妮古·罗宾
figures.feel: 比较集中，六面都是酷酷砸盒空间大，胡乱砸盒摇晃
figures.feelEn: It's relatively concentrated. There are cool smashing boxes on all six sides. There's a lot of space. If you smash the box randomly, it will shake.

figures.name: 娜美
figures.feel: 上下摇有一个小点在上面打盒，左右撞击感声很大，前后略有一点声音但只有下方有一点空间
figures.feelEn: When you shake it up and down, there is a small dot that hits the box on the top. The left and right impact sounds are loud. There is a slight sound from the front and back, but there is only a little space below.

figures.name: 弗兰奇
figures.feel: 因为很宽一只所以是对角线放的，所以一个对角线特别硬但是正常的面很空，上下只有底座的声音
figures.feelEn: Because the one is very wide, it is placed diagonally, so the diagonal one is particularly hard, but the normal surface is very empty, and there is only the sound of the base above and below.

figures.name: 撒谎布
figures.feel: 六面都很满，仅上下有一丝松动感
figures.feelEn: All six sides are full, with only a slight sense of looseness at the top and bottom.

figures.name: 山智
figures.feel: 六面都有一些空间但是砸盒声音并不大不太明显，前后打盒声音很小左右和上下比较大
figures.feelEn: There is some space on all six sides, but the sound of box smashing is not loud or obvious. The sound of box hitting at the front and rear is very small and louder on the left and right and up and down.

figures.name: 特拉法尔加·罗
figures.feel: 很重一个而且个子比较大，左右空间略小但是有清脆声音，上下空间比四周大但是特别砸盒很沉的砸盒声响
figures.feelEn: It is very heavy and relatively large. The left and right spaces are slightly smaller but there is a crisp sound. The upper and lower spaces are larger than the surrounding space, but the box-smashing sound is very heavy.

figures.name: 甚平
figures.feel: 上下很满但是左右空间大，有轻微撞击声
figures.feelEn: It's full up and down, but there's a lot of space left and right, and there's a slight knocking sound.

figures.name: 萨波
figures.feel: 很满六面完全摇不动，仅干燥剂声音，明盒
figures.feelEn: It is very full and cannot be shaken at all on six sides, only the sound of desiccant is heard, and the box is open

figures.name: 布鲁克
figures.feel: 很满六面几乎摇不动，四周毫无空间仅上下略有一点点松动感，明盒
figures.feelEn: It is so full that it can hardly move on all six sides. There is no space around it. It only feels a little loose up and down. The bright box

figures.name: 托尼托尼·乔巴
figures.feel: 明盒！很大一个肥肥的！直接中间一个对面顶出来！上下略有空间沉沉砸盒但没有声音
figures.feelEn: Ming box! A big, fat one! Directly push the one in the middle to the opposite side! There is a little space above and below the box, but there is no sound when the box is hit.

series.nameEn: LABUBU THE MONSTERS|One Piece Series Figures

series.name: TINYTINY|开场白系列
series.note: 很有哥特风，大娃质感

figures.name: 谎言
figures.feel: 很实诚的一个，重量集中像个小秤砣在摇晃，所有前后摇晃声音特别大特别砸盒，明盒的存在
figures.feelEn: Very honest one, the weight is concentrated and it is shaking like a small weight. The sound of all the shaking back and forth is very loud, especially the box is smashed. The existence of the box is obvious.

figures.name: 禁锢
figures.feel: 比较细一只，六面都有空间很大盒很晃，不太好区分
figures.feelEn: It's a relatively thin one, with space on all six sides. The box is very shaky and hard to distinguish.

figures.name: 傀儡
figures.feel: 六面都空间大，六面乱撞乱晃，前后摇打盒声音特别大特别脆
figures.feelEn: There is a lot of space on all six sides, and the six sides are bumping around. The sound of shaking the box back and forth is very loud and crisp.

figures.name: 等待
figures.feel: 上下空间特别大，左右空间很小，配件是单独放盒子里随意四周比较挤，但是上下和四周的空间差距特别特别明显
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower space is very large, and the left and right space is very small. The accessories are placed in separate boxes and the surroundings are crowded, but the gap between the upper and lower spaces and the surrounding spaces is particularly obvious.

figures.name: 棋局
figures.feel: 配件多，有内部撞击的灵动声音，四周都有空间且砸盒，拿住上部分转圈摇晃下部会有互相碰撞的灵动声感比较特别
figures.feelEn: There are many accessories, and there is a smart sound of internal collision. There is space all around and the box is smashed. If you hold the upper part and shake it in a circle, the lower part will make a smart sound of collision, which is quite special.

figures.name: 破茧
figures.feel: 前后左右空间都很大且砸盒，上下空间略小一点
figures.feelEn: The front, rear, left, and right spaces are large and compact, while the upper and lower spaces are slightly smaller.

figures.name: 选择
figures.feel: 比较细的一只，六面都有空间且有声音不易分辨，上下感觉到一个点在清脆打盒，四周打盒点也集中在上部
figures.feelEn: The relatively thin one has space on all six sides and the sound is difficult to distinguish. I can feel a point beating crisply on the top and bottom, and the boxing points all around are also concentrated on the upper part.

figures.name: 玻璃屋
figures.feel: 妥妥的明盒，六面毫无空间纹丝不动满满的，甚至一个侧面能有感觉一整个面都很满，明盒
figures.feelEn: A perfect open box, there is no space on the six sides and it is completely full. Even one side can feel that the entire surface is full. The open box

figures.name: 制衡
figures.feel: 六面都有空间六面都砸盒声音大，争议晃动时感觉撞击点都在中间偏下部分，配件和娃单独放置
figures.feelEn: There is space on all six sides. The sound of smashing the box on all six sides is loud. When it shakes, the impact points are all in the lower middle part. Accessories and dolls are placed separately.

figures.name: 出逃
figures.feel: 左右特别砸盒，上下只有干燥剂在摇晃的声音干燥剂比较大包，前后空间也比较小
figures.feelEn: I smashed the box left and right, and there was only the sound of desiccant shaking from the top and bottom. The desiccant package is relatively large, and the front and rear space is relatively small.

figures.name: 谜题
figures.feel: 很重一只比较高，底部也比较大，四周毫无空间仅干燥剂声音，上下略有一点空间有声音和砸盒感
figures.feelEn: It's very heavy. The one is taller and has a larger bottom. There is no space around it except for the sound of the desiccant. There is a little space above and below where there is sound and the feeling of the box being smashed.

figures.name: 反击
figures.feel: 上下空间特别大，四周摇晃时也有互相碰撞的声音，底和娃分开且底座会动有互相碰撞的声响，很特别
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower space is very large, and there are collision sounds when the surroundings are shaking. The base and the baby are separated and the base moves, making collision sounds. It is very special.

series.noteEn: Very gothic style, with a baby-like texture

series.name: 小甜豆|爱的抱抱系列
series.note: 明盒很多

figures.name: 当我感到爱你
figures.feel: 很轻很满，整体是六面都摇不动，配件单独袋子包装有轻微的晃动感
figures.feelEn: It's very light and full, and the whole thing can't shake from all six sides. The accessories are packed in separate bags and have a slight shaking feeling.

figures.name: 当我感到难过时
figures.feel: 比较空，重量集中在中间，上下空间特别大前面也有空间，仅仅只有空间很小甚至有一个点在撞击
figures.feelEn: It is relatively empty, the weight is concentrated in the middle, the upper and lower spaces are extremely large, and there is space in the front, but the space is very small and there is even a point hitting it.

figures.name: 当我有所收获时
figures.feel: 左右晃动感很明显但是很轻所以不打盒，前后和上下轻微一点空间
figures.feelEn: The left and right shaking feeling is obvious but very light, so I don’t want to worry about it. There is a little space in the front and back and up and down.

figures.name: 当我努力变好时
figures.feel: 很高一只，六面毫无空间仅有干燥剂在摇晃的声音，很满很满

figures.feelEn: It's very tall, with no space on six sides, only the sound of the desiccant shaking, very full.

figures.name: 当我生病时
figures.feel: 明盒！左右直接卡住对顶一个点，摇晃时六面不动仅头部颗粒撞击声感，100%明盒
figures.feelEn: Ming box! The left and right sides are directly stuck to a point on the top. When shaking, the six sides do not move, only the head particles hit the sound, 100% clear box

figures.name: 当我是一个小恶魔
figures.feel: 六面都有空间，四面摇晃时都是娃小半个部分被摇晃而不是整个的撞击感，上下空间稍微略大一点点

figures.name: 当我雄心壮志时
figures.feel: 上下略有一丝空间轻微撞击声，四周都完全摇不动很满很满
figures.feelEn: There was a slight knocking sound in the space up and down, and the surroundings were completely motionless. It was very full.

figures.name: 当我生气时
figures.feel: 上下空间特别大有很沉的打盒感，四周没有空间很满
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower spaces are very large and have a heavy box-like feel. There is no space around and it is very full.

figures.name: 当我感到平静时
figures.feel: 整只虽然重但是有种松动的感觉，前后上下都略有空间但是都不打盒没什么声音，很松动的轻微撞击感
figures.feelEn: Although the whole thing is heavy, it feels loose. There is a little space at the front, rear, and top, but there is no sound without opening the box. It feels very loose and has a slight impact.

figures.name: 当我睡觉时
figures.feel: 特别满但是是这只干燥剂特别特别大，丝毫不动仅卡片晃动感，下部分干燥剂特别大特别沉特别重
figures.feelEn: It's very full, but this desiccant is very, very large. It doesn't move at all, only the card feels like it's shaking. The lower part of the desiccant is very large, very heavy.

figures.name: 当我变得麻木之前
figures.feel: 很重一只，上下摇晃有空间有沉闷的砸盒感声音比较小，四周都打盒声音大也有空间

figures.name: 当我不想起床时

figures.nameEn: When I Don't Want to Get up

figures.name: 战斗敖丙
figures.feel: 很满六面毫无空间，可能是配件比较占位

figures.name: 应援式
figures.feel: 上下空间较小，前后左右的打盒都在上部，上部有清脆打盒声
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower space is small, the box opening on the front, rear, left and right are all on the upper part, and there is a clear box opening sound on the upper part.

figures.name: 小卡拍摄
figures.feel: 上下特别打盒很沉的感觉，前后左右略打盒但声音不是很大
figures.feelEn: It feels very heavy when the box is pressed up and down. It is slightly boxed on the front, back, left and right, but the sound is not very loud.

series.noteEn: The hidden item is the open box

series.name: POP MART|十四周年无双镇系列
series.note: DIMOO和SKULLPANDA是明盒，能发光

figures.name: LABUBU 云游剑侠
figures.feel: 上下空间小，前后左右略有空间有打盒声但比较小
figures.feelEn: The space up and down is small, and there is a little space in the front, back, left and right. There is a sound of box beating but it is relatively small.

figures.name: DIMOO 不烬
figures.feel: 轻且完全无空间摇不动，只有干燥剂的声音，明盒
figures.feelEn: Light and no space to shake, only the sound of desiccant, clear box

figures.name: MOLLY 醉拳顽童
figures.feel: 六面都有松动感，上下打盒明显顶部一个点打盒，前后打盒声比左右大打盒点在中间偏下部很清脆的打盒声
figures.feelEn: There is a sense of looseness on all six sides. When the box is hit up and down, it is obvious that there is a point on the top. The sound when the front and rear boxes are hit is louder than the left and right. The box hit point is in the middle and lower part, and there is a very clear sound when the box is hit.

figures.name: SWEET BEAN 丐世英雄
figures.feel: 很轻但是都不怎么打盒，六面都有空间，前后略微有一点打盒感
figures.feelEn: It's very light but not very boxy. It has space on all six sides and has a slightly boxy feel at the front and rear.

figures.name: 小野 独行隐士
figures.feel: 细长的一只，上下左右前后都打盒且有空间，打盒声音六面都很大
figures.feelEn: It's a slender one, with space for the top, bottom, left, and back, and the boxing sound is loud from all sides.

figures.name: HACIPUPU 仙鹤书生
figures.feel: 上下打盒清脆声音，四周没啥空间没啥感觉一点点打盒声
figures.feelEn: There is a crisp sound when the box is being opened up and down. There is no space around and no feeling. There is a little bit of boxing sound.

figures.name: KUBO 枫尽染
figures.feel: 四周只有一点点空间，但是上下空间略大且打盒有声音，很明显的差异感
figures.feelEn: There is only a little space around it, but the upper and lower spaces are slightly larger and there is sound when playing the box. The difference is obvious.

figures.name: SKULLPANDA 聆蝶
figures.feel: 六面全部没有空间很紧很满，只有干燥剂的声音，明盒
figures.feelEn: There is no space on all six sides. It is very tight and full. There is only the sound of desiccant. The open box

figures.name: Zsiga 两仪
figures.feel: 竖着放的且有塑料壳，六面都有空间
figures.feelEn: It is placed vertically and has a plastic case, with space on all six sides.

figures.name: PINO JELLY 夜行月
figures.feel: 也很沉但是有配件不是一整个所以有塑料袋的摩擦声，四周几乎无空间，上下空间很大砸盒感和声音特别大
figures.feelEn: It is also very heavy, but the accessories are not in one piece, so there is a rubbing sound of the plastic bag. There is almost no space around it, and there is a lot of space up and down. It feels like the box is smashing and the sound is very loud.

figures.name: PUCKY 静谧旅人
figures.feel: 特别沉，上下尤其砸盒上下空间特别特别大，但是四周空间比较小但是也有很重的砸盒感
figures.feelEn: It's very heavy, and the space above and below the box is particularly large, but the surrounding space is relatively small, but it also has a heavy box-smashing feel.

figures.name: Crybaby 炽狐仙子
figures.feel: 满重毫无空间，上下顶的鼓出来，明盒
figures.feelEn: It is full of weight and has no space. The upper and lower tops bulge out and the box is exposed.

series.noteEn: DIMOO and SKULLPANDA are bright boxes that can shine
series.nameEn: POP MART|Matchless POP MART 14th Anniversary Series Figures

series.name: THE MONSTERS|慵懒瑜伽系列
series.note: 双层盒，干燥剂大小随机但只有单包

figures.name: 炫耀式
figures.feel: 无配件，六面有空间，感觉一个长条在中间晃的感觉，在下部一个面砸盒的感觉是底座平放
figures.feelEn: There are no accessories, there is space on six sides, it feels like a long bar is swinging in the middle, and it feels like a box is smashed on one side at the bottom, and the base is lying flat.

figures.name: 我"美式"
figures.feel: 明盒，这只六面无空间很满是一整个，有卡片在上下砸的声音，且中部能感受到塑料袋很膨胀很满的感觉
figures.feelEn: The bright box has six sides and is very full. There is the sound of cards being smashed up and down, and you can feel the plastic bag in the middle feeling very full and expanded.

figures.name: 暴汗式
figures.feel: 配件在晃动感明显，六面都略有空间但四周空间明显很小，有很明显塑料袋的摩擦声
figures.feelEn: The accessories are obviously shaking. There is a slight space on the six sides but the surrounding space is obviously very small. There is an obvious friction sound of the plastic bag.

figures.name: 杂技式
figures.feel: 明盒，娃摇不动配件底座却在上下砸盒且声音大很明显
figures.feelEn: The box is open, but the baby can't shake the accessory base, but the box is smashed up and down, and the sound is loud and obvious.

figures.name: 小鸟式
figures.feel: 完全摇不动，明盒，有塑料壳保护娃所以特别满，仅仅干燥剂的声音，中部有明显鼓起来但是不顶盒
figures.feelEn: It cannot be shaken at all. The open box has a plastic shell to protect the baby, so it is very full. There is only the sound of desiccant. There is obvious bulging in the middle but there is no top box.

figures.name: 瞌睡式
figures.feel: 六面都有空间，四周砸盒声音小，上下砸盒声音特别大特别闷，但是娃比较轻重量集中在中间
figures.feelEn: There is space on all six sides, and the sound of smashing boxes around is quiet, but the sound of hitting boxes up and down is very loud and muffled, but the baby is relatively light and the weight is concentrated in the middle.

figures.name: 躺平式
figures.feel: 无配件，六面都有空间但是不是很大，上下闷闷声音砸盒不大声，四个侧面中间都会砸盒打盒点在中间偏下一点点处且非常不明显
figures.feelEn: There are no accessories. There is space on all six sides but not very big. The sound of the box being smashed up and down is not loud. The box will be hit in the middle of the four sides. The point where the box is hit is slightly lower in the middle and is very inconspicuous.

figures.name: 放空式
figures.feel: 明盒，六面只有松动感没有砸盒空间，有娃配件互相碰撞的声音松动碰撞感很特别
figures.feelEn: The six sides of the open box only feel loose and there is no space for smashing the box. The sound of baby accessories colliding with each other makes the feeling of looseness and collision very special.

figures.name: 自信式
figures.feel: 六面空间很大，上下砸盒特别沉，六面砸盒声特别特别明显，且下方有一个点像小直角特别砸盒很特别
figures.feelEn: The space on the six sides is very large, and the box is very heavy when smashed up and down. The sound of the box being smashed on the six sides is very obvious, and there is a point at the bottom like a small right angle, which is very special when the box is smashed.

figures.name: 拉伸式
figures.feel: 很整一只，六面都有空间但上下空间明显小于四周，上下有很大的砸盒声音闷闷沉沉的
figures.feelEn: It's a very neat one, with space on all six sides, but the upper and lower spaces are obviously smaller than the surrounding ones. There's a loud, muffled sound of boxes being smashed up and down.

series.nameEn: LABUBU THE MONSTERS|Lazy Yoga Series Figures
series.noteEn: Double-layer box, desiccant size is random but only single package

series.name: POP MART|浪漫指尖第3代系列
series.note: 手感差异比较小，重量差异也不大

figures.name: KUBO 当我想起你
figures.feel: 六面都有一点空间且轻微晃动时有声音，圆盘略小一点点所以有空间摇的动
figures.feelEn: There is a little space on all six sides and there is a sound when it shakes slightly. The disk is a little smaller, so there is room for it to shake.

figures.name: Molly 银河心语
figures.feel: 只有松动感和干燥剂的声音，圆盘是对角线放置的很大所以几乎都摇不动
figures.feelEn: There is only a loose feeling and the sound of desiccant. The disc is placed diagonally so large that it can hardly be shaken.

figures.name: HACIPUPU 我们的恋曲
figures.feel: 所有声音很大，上下也有空间，圆盘稍小一点都有空间且左右声音明显
figures.feelEn: All the sounds are loud and there is space up and down. If the disk is slightly smaller, there is space and the left and right sounds are obvious.

figures.name: LABUBU 神秘轨迹
figures.feel: 六面都有松动感有轻微的撞击声，圆盘稍小一点点所以都摇得动
figures.feelEn: There is a loose feeling and a slight knocking sound on all six sides. The disc is a little smaller so it can shake.

figures.name: PINO JELLY 蜜语巧克力
figures.feel: 上下空间比四周大一些，也是轻微的声音，圆盘也不算大所以也摇的动
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower spaces are larger than the surrounding areas, and the sound is also slight. The disc is not too big, so it can shake.

figures.name: CHAKA 星间距离
figures.feel: 六面纹丝不动只有干燥剂的声音，圆盘偏大一点所以比较没有空间
figures.feelEn: The six sides are motionless except for the sound of the desiccant. The disk is a bit larger so there is less space.

figures.name: Sweet Bean 怦然心动
figures.feel: 六面都有空间且有轻微砸盒声，圆盘算略小一点
figures.feelEn: There is space on all six sides and there is a slight sound of the box being smashed. The round plate is slightly smaller.
figures.nameEn: Sweet Bean You Are My Love

figures.name: PUCKY 炙热心动
figures.feel: 上下顶直接顶出来了！四周砸盒且声音大，圆盘偏小
figures.feelEn: It came out directly by pushing it up and down! Boxes are smashed around and the sound is loud, and the disc is too small

figures.name: DIMOO 另一朵玫瑰
figures.feel: 六面都有一丁点空间，且前后晃动感很明显有轻微的砸盒感无声，圆盘中等不大不小
figures.feelEn: There is a little space on all six sides, and the back and forth shaking is obvious and there is a slight box-smashing feeling without any sound. The disc is medium, not too big, not too small.

figures.name: SKULLPANDA 你永远吸引我
figures.feel: 六面都有一点点空间且都可以摇盒有轻微的撞击感但是没有声音，圆盘不算大正常大小
figures.feelEn: There is a little space on all six sides and the box can be shaken. There is a slight impact but no sound. The disc is not too big and is of normal size.

series.noteEn: The difference in feel is relatively small, and the difference in weight is not big either.

series.name: KUBO|呼吸感应系列
series.note: 明盒很多很多

figures.name: 冬日晴空
figures.feel: 又空又满，树枝把整个盒子撑起来了，六面摇晃只有干燥剂的声音，很神奇的感觉
figures.feelEn: It's both empty and full. The branches are holding up the whole box. The only sound of desiccant shaking when shaking from six sides is a very magical feeling.

figures.name: 绵绵
figures.feel: 六面卡死毫无空间，下部六分之一处直接左右两个对面顶出来，很明显的手感，明盒
figures.feelEn: The six sides are stuck and there is no space. The lower one-sixth part is directly pushed out from the left and right sides. It has a very obvious feel and is a clear box.

figures.name: 今夜或不再
figures.feel: 明盒，下部六分之一处直接捏得到东西顶出来了，非常明显的感觉
figures.feelEn: It's a clear box. You can pinch the lower one-sixth of the box and something will pop out. It's a very obvious feeling.

figures.name: 遗忘海
figures.feel: 上下略有空间且干燥剂声音特别大，四周中上部分比较满能捏到一点点东西
figures.feelEn: There is a little space at the top and bottom, and the desiccant is very loud. The middle and upper parts around it are quite full and you can pinch a little bit.

figures.name: 月桂私语
figures.feel: 同样六面都没有空间只有干燥剂的声音，重量集中在下部，下部捏起来很明显的塑料声感
figures.feelEn: There is also no space on the six sides, only the sound of desiccant. The weight is concentrated in the lower part, and the plastic sound is obvious when the lower part is pinched.

figures.name: 迷藏
figures.feel: 上下特别满但是不顶不鼓，六面毫无空间并且摇不动一点声音也没有，很特别的手感
figures.feelEn: The top and bottom are very full, but there is no top or bulge. There is no space on the six sides and there is no sound at all when shaking. It has a very special feel.

figures.name: 流沙
figures.feel: 轻的不行！六面乱晃的砸盒非常明显的手感，明盒
figures.feelEn: Too light! The six sides of the smashing box are very obvious, and the box is clear.

figures.name: 秘密
figures.feel: 六面空间都大都有撞击感，娃比较小的一只在中间，明盒，很难有这么空的撞击感
figures.feelEn: There is a sense of impact on most of the six sides of the space. The smaller one is in the middle. It is a bright box. It is difficult to have such an empty impact feeling.

figures.name: 吞噬
figures.feel: 六面全满全部摇不动，只有轻微的干燥剂的声音，上部明显感觉更满捏上去有塑料袋声
figures.feelEn: The six sides are all full and cannot be shaken. There is only a slight sound of desiccant. The upper part obviously feels fuller and there is a sound of plastic bags when pinching it.

figures.name: 无尽夏
figures.feel: 上下砸盒空间大，前后左右都略有空间，很小很闷的打盒声音
figures.feelEn: There is a lot of space for smashing the box up and down, and there is a little space in the front, back, left and right, and the sound of box breaking is very small and muffled.

figures.name: 最后的玫瑰
figures.feel: 这只没别的就是上下中间一个点很顶！头顶中间和底座直接一个轻捏对顶的大动作，明盒
figures.feelEn: This one only has one point in the middle that is very top! The middle of the head and the base are directly pinched to the top, and the bright box

figures.name: 时光琥珀
figures.feel: 上下特别砸盒，尤其头顶处能感受到一个点很用力的在砸上面且有声音
figures.feelEn: I smashed the box up and down, especially at the top of my head, I could feel a point hitting it very hard and there was a sound.

series.noteEn: Lots and lots of bright boxes

figures.name: 木屋
figures.feel: 都很满几乎都没有空间，中间部分四周有2个对面略顶盒
figures.feelEn: They are all full and there is almost no space. The middle part is surrounded by 2 slightly top boxes facing each other.

figures.name: 隐藏款-熊偶
figures.feel: 隐藏款，重量107g-115g都有偏重，四周基本上没有声音没有空隙因为熊头特别的大所以会把四周撑住，打盒的点是耳朵处
figures.feelEn: Hidden model, the weight is 107g-115g. It is heavy. There is basically no sound and no gaps around it. Because the bear’s head is very big, it will support the surroundings. The point of packing is at the ears.

figures.name: 晴天娃娃
figures.feel: 上下略有一点空间松动感，左右空间大，前后几乎没有空间
figures.feelEn: There is a slight feeling of loose space up and down, there is a lot of space on the left and right, and there is almost no space at the front and rear.

figures.name: 座钟
figures.feel: 四周很满，上下有空间，中间偏上部分会有顶盒出现是房子的沿边
figures.feelEn: It's full all around, with space up and down, and a top box appears in the upper part of the middle, which is the edge of the house.

figures.name: 外星人
figures.feel: 上下有空间且有砸盒声，前后无空间，左右略有空间打盒点在中间
figures.feelEn: There is space up and down and there is a sound of the box being smashed. There is no space in the front and back. There is a little space left and right. The box is hit in the middle.

figures.name: 马戏团
figures.feel: 上下满完全没有空间，四周都有一点松动感但是中部有直接很满的一圈，可以轻按到一圈满的感觉
figures.feelEn: There is absolutely no space at the top and bottom, and there is a little loose feeling on all sides, but there is a very full circle in the middle. You can press it lightly until it feels full.

figures.name: 路障
figures.feel: 有配件在里面松动感，四周略有空间，配件感明显
figures.feelEn: There is a loose feeling of accessories inside, there is a slight space around it, and the accessories feel obvious

figures.name: 鸟人
figures.feel: 真的很重很重，六面都几乎没有空间很满的一只但是完全不顶盒，松动感用力摇还是会有一些些
figures.feelEn: It's really heavy. There's almost no room on all six sides. It's very full, but it doesn't have a top box at all. There's still some looseness when you shake it hard.

figures.name: 堡垒
figures.feel: 上下满，四周都有空间且打盒，比较明显的手感
figures.feelEn: The top and bottom are full, there is space all around and the box is boxed, which gives a more obvious feel.

figures.name: 勇士
figures.feel: 上下毫无空间，前后略有一点空间轻微打盒，左右只有松动感
figures.feelEn: There is no space up and down, there is a little space in the front and back, and the box is slightly boxed, and there is only a loose feeling on the left and right.

figures.name: 烛台
figures.feel: 上下空间大打盒，四周也有空间打盒
figures.feelEn: There is plenty of room above and below to pack boxes, and there is also space around the sides to pack boxes.

figures.name: 鸟笼
figures.feel: 上下空间大打盒！四周也略有一点空间但是打盒声音很小，轻微撞击感
figures.feelEn: There’s a lot of space up and down! There is a little space around it, but the sound of opening the box is very small and there is a slight impact.

figures.name: 诗人
figures.feel: 上下会被顶满，前后满所有略松动，上部左右感觉到有东西有一点点撑住是诗人的帽子沿边
figures.feelEn: The top and bottom will be filled, and the front and back will be slightly loose. You can feel something holding a little bit on the left and right parts of the upper part, which is the brim of the poet's hat.

series.name: CHAKA|逐光精灵系列
series.note: 难度五颗星，很难

figures.name: 极光
figures.feel: 明盒，中间偏下部分前后能捏到一点点东西，四周全满毫无空间纹丝不动
figures.feelEn: It's a clear box. You can pinch a little bit of stuff in the lower part of the middle, but it's completely full and there's no space around it and it doesn't move at all.

figures.name: 霞光
figures.feel: 六面全满毫无空间塞的满满的，但没有任何顶出来的感觉
figures.feelEn: The six sides are full and there is no space. It is full, but there is no feeling of pushing out.

figures.name: 流星
figures.feel: 很轻，六面摇晃只有干燥剂的声音没有其他感觉
figures.feelEn: It's very light. When shaking from six sides, there is only the sound of the desiccant and no other sensation.

figures.name: 萤火
figures.feel: 上下摇时底座会上下砸盒（在侧边），四周只有干燥剂的声音
figures.feelEn: When shaking up and down, the base will knock the box up and down (on the side), and there is only the sound of desiccant all around.

figures.name: 彩虹
figures.feel: 六面毫无空间，盒子中间部分满到鼓出来但是捏进去又捏不到东西，内部骨架大但是比较空
figures.feelEn: There is no space on the six sides. The middle part of the box is so full that it bulges out, but nothing can be pinched when pinched in. The internal frame is large but relatively empty.

figures.name: 树影
figures.feel: 左右和上下略有空间，前后特别满，上下是整体在轻微晃动的感觉
figures.feelEn: There is a little space left and right and up and down, and the front and back are particularly full. It feels like the whole thing is shaking slightly up and down.

figures.name: 波光
figures.feel: 六面都会有一点松动，但是上下摇时干燥剂和卡片的声音非常明显，六面没有娃的任何声音
figures.feelEn: The six sides will be a little loose, but the sound of the desiccant and card is very obvious when shaking up and down, and there is no sound from the six sides.

figures.name: 闪电
figures.feel: 四周很满没有空间，但是上下有比较大空间有闷闷的砸盒声
figures.feelEn: The surroundings are very full and there is no space, but there is a relatively large space above and below. There is a muffled sound of boxes being smashed.

figures.name: 薪火
figures.feel: 重，上下略有一侧有空间且有晃动的声音，但是其他方向摇盒都是很慢很慢的那种感觉
figures.feelEn: It is heavy, there is a little space on one side and there is a shaking sound, but when you shake it in other directions, it feels very slow.

figures.name: 烛光
figures.feel: 四周摇不动，只有上下摇有轻微的内部在晃动的感觉，有闷闷的一点点砸盒感
figures.feelEn: It can't move around. Only when you shake it up and down, there is a slight feeling of shaking inside, and there is a bit of a dull box-smashing feeling.

figures.name: 月下
figures.feel: 六面全满没有一点空间，干燥剂在最下面所以整体被撑得很满，感觉上空下满上部空却摇不动
figures.feelEn: The six sides are full and there is no space at all. The desiccant is at the bottom, so the whole thing is very full. It feels like the upper part is full and the lower part is empty, but the upper part is empty and cannot be shaken.

figures.name: 烟花
figures.feel: 四周略有松动，上下比较而言空间相对更大一点，砸盒的声音不是那种闷闷的了更清楚一点点
