figures.name: 戾
figures.feel: 很重一个 而且很高 四面都空 但是没空间 上下很高但是不顶出来 编号302616518
figures.feelEn: It's very heavy and very high. It's empty on all sides but there's no space. It's very high up and down but it doesn't push up. No. 302616518

figures.name: 小小消防员
figures.feel: 上下空间比较大 前后无声音 左右声音略大有空间
figures.feelEn: There is relatively large space up and down, no sound from the front and rear, slightly larger sound from the left and right, but space

figures.name: 小小博士
figures.feel: 上下空间大 四周都有空间且有声音 左右尚不打盒
figures.feelEn: There is plenty of space up and down, there is space on all sides and there is sound, and the left and right sides are not boxed yet.

figures.name: 小小冠军
figures.feel: 六面都略有空间 但都不打盒 前后声音略大
figures.feelEn: There is a little space on all six sides, but there are no boxes. The front and rear sound is slightly louder.

figures.name: 小小医生
figures.feel: 上下空间大并且砸盒明显 四周也都砸盒声音大
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower spaces are large and the box smashing is obvious. The sound of box smashing is loud all around.

figures.name: 小小指挥官
figures.feel: 上下沉 砸盒感明显 左右卡片晃动声音特别大 前后也有空间但不砸盒
figures.feelEn: It sinks up and down. It feels like the box is being smashed. The sound of the cards shaking left and right is very loud. There is space in the front and back, but the box is not smashed.

figures.name: 小小农夫
figures.feel: 上下左右都满 前后有一点空间 上下有卡片在动
figures.feelEn: The top, bottom, left and right are full, and there is a little space in the front and back. There are cards moving above and below.

figures.name: 小小派送员
figures.feel: 六面都是略有空间但是不砸盒
figures.feelEn: There is a little space on all six sides but the box won’t break.

figures.name: 小小安全员
figures.feel: 前后上下满无空间 左右几乎无空间
figures.feelEn: There is absolutely no space at the front, rear, top and bottom, and almost no space at the left or right.

figures.name: 小小船员
figures.feel: 上下略有空间但无声音 前后空间大且砸盒
figures.feelEn: There is a little space up and down but no sound. There is a lot of space at the front and rear and the box is smashed.

figures.name: 小小老师
figures.feel: 上下满无空间 四周略微一点点距离 很小
figures.feelEn: There is no space above and below. There is only a little distance around. It is very small.

figures.name: 小小宇航员
figures.feel: 特别满 上部侧面略顶 六面全部摇不动
figures.feelEn: Very full. The upper part is slightly raised on the sides and cannot be shaken on all six sides.

figures.name: 小小飞行员
figures.feel: 特别重 但是上下仍有空间 四面满
figures.feelEn: Extremely heavy, but there’s still room above and below, and it’s full on all sides

series.name: PINO JELLY|味觉性格测试系列
series.note: 干燥剂可能有区别 这是整盒全部的重量

figures.name: 泼辣
figures.feel: 好重 前后完全无空间 但左右上下都有一点空间 很沉
figures.feelEn: It's so heavy. There's no space at all in the front or rear, but there's a little space left, right, up and down. It's very heavy.

figures.name: 直冲
figures.feel: 很轻 也是在里面乱晃 但是前后打盒声很清脆
figures.feelEn: It's very light, and it's still shaking around in it, but the sound of the front and back boxing is very clear.

figures.name: 苦闷
figures.feel: 左右毫无空间 前后一丢丢声音 上下一丢丢空间 很满
figures.feelEn: There is no space left and right, there is a little sound in the front and back, and there is a little space in the top and bottom. It is very full.

figures.name: 平淡
figures.feel: 四周只有一点点空间且偏上 上下砸盒感很重
figures.feelEn: There is only a little space around it and it is tilted upward. It feels heavy when the box is smashed up and down.

figures.name: 浮躁
figures.feel: 四面有空间砸盒 但上下比较满但也有小声音
figures.feelEn: There is space on all sides to smash the box, but the top and bottom are relatively full, but there is also a small sound.

figures.name: 臭屁
figures.feel: 很沉 上下有砸盒感 四周也几乎没有空间
figures.feelEn: It's very heavy, it feels like it's being smashed up and down, and there's almost no space around it.

figures.name: 甜腻
figures.feel: 上下有卡片在晃动的声音 前后满 左右有配件在晃动
figures.feelEn: There is the sound of cards shaking up and down, the front and back are full, and there are accessories shaking left and right.

figures.name: 冷酷
figures.feel: 上下无声音 前后左右很响 很重的砸盒声
figures.feelEn: No sound from up and down, very loud from front to back, left and right, heavy box smashing sound

figures.name: 爽快
figures.feel: 很轻 很集中的在中间乱晃 100%明盒
figures.feelEn: Very light, very concentrated and swaying around in the middle. 100% clear box

figures.name: 干脆
figures.feel: 上下有空间 但不砸盒 周围四面空间也很小 左右更满
figures.feelEn: There is space up and down, but the box is not broken. The space around it is also very small, and the left and right are more full.

figures.name: 嫉妒
figures.feel: 前后砸盒声音闷 左右砸盒声音很大 上下声音小但配件乱晃
figures.feelEn: The sound of smashing the box front and back is muffled, the sound of smashing the box left and right is loud, the sound of up and down is small, but the accessories are shaking around.

figures.name: 单纯
figures.feel: 只有前后有空间 而且很闷的声音 其他面都很满
figures.feelEn: There is only space at the front and back and the sound is very muffled. The other sides are full.

series.noteEn: The desiccant may be different. This is the total weight of the whole box.
series.nameEn: PINO JELLY|Taste ＆ Personality Quiz Series Figures

figures.name: 溜出的狼崽
figures.feel: 比较轻 但是六面都比较满 摇不太动
figures.feelEn: Relatively light, but relatively full on all six sides, it doesn’t move much

figures.name: 搞错身份的熊猫
figures.feel: 重 但是上下特别打盒 很沉 四周略有空间
figures.feelEn: It’s heavy, but it’s boxed up and down so it’s heavy and there’s a little space around it.

figures.name: 被困的青蛙
figures.feel: 轻却六面什么都摇不动 满满的
figures.feelEn: It's light but can't shake anything from six sides. It's full of energy.

figures.name: 富有的熊
figures.feel: 上下空间小有闷闷的声音 四周空间大 有声音
figures.feelEn: There is a muffled sound in the small space above and below. There is a sound in the large space around.

figures.name: 流浪的兔子
figures.feel: 左右满 前后有空间打盒 上下略有空间
figures.feelEn: The left and right sides are full, there is space in the front and back, and there is a little space in the top and bottom.

figures.name: 无聊的小狗
figures.feel: 上下和前后空间大 有松动感
figures.feelEn: There is plenty of space up and down and front and rear, and there is a sense of looseness.

figures.name: 自由的鸟
figures.feel: 六面都有空间 都有小声音打盒 闷闷的
figures.feelEn: There is space on all six sides, and there are small sounds playing in the box, which is muffled.

figures.name: 丑小鸭
figures.feel: 上下感觉已经快到满了微微空间定点打盒 四周都有空间晃动
figures.feelEn: It feels like it's almost full up and down. The Weiwei space is fixed at the box. There is space shaking all around.

figures.name: 需要休息的猫
figures.feel: 轻 但是上下小声打盒 四周大声打盒
figures.feelEn: Light, but play the box quietly up and down, and play the box loudly all around.

figures.name: 纸做的梦
figures.feel: 很满的一只 左右能捏的到一点点撑出来的感觉
figures.feelEn: It's a very full one and you can squeeze it from left to right until it feels like it's being stretched out a little bit.

figures.name: 暴怒的黑熊
figures.feel: 上下满有很大的干燥剂声音 左右特别重的砸盒感
figures.feelEn: There was a loud desiccant sound coming up and down, and there was a particularly heavy box-smashing feeling on the left and right.

figures.name: 警觉的大象
figures.feel: 六面什么也摇不动 也没有声音
figures.feelEn: Nothing moved on the six sides and there was no sound.

figures.name: 顺从的你
figures.feel: 明盒 100% 很多东西在乱晃的声音只有它
figures.feelEn: Ming box 100% The only sound that a lot of things are shaking around

figures.name: 外表冷漠的你
figures.feel: 上下满 左右满 前后空间大 整体很轻
figures.feelEn: Full top and bottom, full left and right, large front and rear space, overall very light

figures.name: 愚钝的你
figures.feel: 比较小的一整只 六面都有空间 上下砸盒
figures.feelEn: A relatively small one with space on all six sides. Smash the box up and down.

figures.name: 有智慧的你
figures.feel: 上下空间小 前后空间很大 干燥剂声音大
figures.feelEn: Small upper and lower space, large front and rear space, loud desiccant sound

figures.name: 关切则乱的你
figures.feel: 四面满 上下略有空间但是不大
figures.feelEn: It's full on all sides, with a little space above and below but not much.

figures.name: 大胆莽撞的你
figures.feel: 配件被包了起来 四周满 上下空间大 但不是很砸盒
figures.feelEn: The accessories are wrapped up, and there’s plenty of room on all sides, but it’s not too boxy.

figures.name: 坐立不安的你
figures.feel: 很明显的左右下方顶的凸出来 上下空间很大 四面满 明盒
figures.feelEn: There are obvious protrusions on the left, right and bottom roof. There is a lot of space at the top and bottom, and the open box is full on all sides.

figures.name: 胆怯害羞的你
figures.feel: 上下左右很满 前后空间大 打盒有声音
figures.feelEn: It’s full of space on the top, bottom, left and right, and there’s plenty of space at the front and rear. There’s a sound when opening the box.

figures.name: 忧心忡忡的你
figures.feel: 六面都很空 六面都打盒有声音
figures.feelEn: All six sides are empty. There is a sound when opening the box on all six sides.

figures.name: 坏脾气的你
figures.feel: 六面满 什么声音都没 也摸不到 很明确
figures.feelEn: Rokumenman. There is no sound or touch. It is very clear.

figures.name: 睡不着的你
figures.feel: 好满 只有干燥剂的声音 左右后侧捏得到一点阻碍感 比较明显 估计是帽子
figures.feelEn: It's very full. There is only the sound of desiccant. I can feel a little obstruction when pinching the left and right rear sides. It's more obvious. I guess it's the hat.

figures.name: 慵懒的你
figures.feel: 特别沉的一只 左右中间部位满 可以摸到顶但不凸
figures.feelEn: A particularly heavy one. The left, right and middle parts are full. You can touch the top but it’s not convex.

figures.name: 王者洛奇
figures.feel: 上下空间大 配件在晃动 前后头部打盒声有 左右没有
figures.feelEn: There is plenty of room up and down. Accessories are shaking. There is a box-boxing sound on the front and rear heads but not on the left and right.

figures.name: 火烈鸟
figures.feel: 上下砸盒 前后砸盒 左右有空间 不那么砸盒 很明显
figures.feelEn: Smash the box up and down. Smash the box front and back. There is space on the left and right. It’s not so smashing. It’s obvious.

figures.name: 恶魔
figures.feel: 左右打盒在上部 前后也打盒在中部 上下有空间但不大 不好分辨
figures.feelEn: The left and right boxes are boxed in the upper part, and the front and rear boxes are also boxed in the middle. There is space at the top and bottom but not big, so it is difficult to distinguish.

figures.name: 麋鹿
figures.feel: 上下空间大 砸盒 四周都有砸盒感 比较集中的重量 不好分辨
figures.feelEn: There is a lot of space at the top and bottom. The box is smashed. There is a feeling of smashing the box all around. The weight is relatively concentrated and it is difficult to distinguish.

figures.name: 天使
figures.feel: 上下空间大但不砸盒 四周都是下部特别空 不好分辨
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower spaces are large but the box is not broken. The lower part is particularly empty on all sides and is difficult to distinguish.

figures.name: 雪球
figures.feel: 上下有塑料袋的声音 左右打盒前后不打盒 很特别
figures.feelEn: There are sounds of plastic bags going up and down. Boxes are being packed left and right but not before and after. It’s very special.

figures.name: 霸主洛奇
figures.feel: 上下空间大 配件在晃动 前后头部打盒声有 左右没有
figures.feelEn: There is plenty of room up and down. Accessories are shaking. There is a box-boxing sound on the front and rear heads but not on the left and right.

figures.name: 雪鸮
figures.feel: 也是轻 上下空间大砸盒 四周砸盒感 比较集中 不好分辨
figures.feelEn: It is also light. There are large boxes in the upper and lower spaces. The feeling of boxes in the surrounding area is relatively concentrated and difficult to distinguish.

figures.name: 小青龙
figures.feel: 上下砸盒略有空间 前后左右都是头重脚轻
figures.feelEn: There is a little space when smashing the box up and down. It is top-heavy in the front, rear, left and right.

figures.name: 魔术师
figures.feel: 左右很满 上下略有空间砸盒 前后头部打盒 比较闷
figures.feelEn: The left and right sides are very full, and there is a little space at the top and bottom for the box. The front and rear heads are boxed, which is quite boring.

figures.name: 睡衣兔
figures.feel: 特别重 特别满 明盒100% 上下无空间 前后左右都有空间 很比较小
figures.feelEn: Very heavy and very full. 100% of the open box has no space above and below. There is space on the front, rear, left and right. It is very small.

figures.name: 小丑
figures.feel: 上下只有卡片在打盒的声音 前后头部一个点打盒 左右不打盒
figures.feelEn: There is only the sound of cards being boxed up and down. Boxing is done at one point on the front and back of the head. There is no boxing on the left and right.

figures.name: 小海怪
figures.feel: 六面空 上下打盒
figures.feelEn: Six sides empty, top and bottom boxes

figures.name: 怪猫咪
figures.feel: 六面空 上下砸盒
figures.feelEn: Six sides empty, smash the box up and down

figures.name: 心愿女巫
figures.feel: 上下一点点空间 侧面很满
figures.feelEn: A little space up and down, but full on the sides

figures.name: 糖霜人
figures.feel: 上下左右都特别砸盒 很重 前后不砸盒
figures.feelEn: The box is particularly heavy when it is smashed up, down, left and right. It is very heavy. The box is not smashed front and back.

figures.name: 狼人甜心
figures.feel: 很厚实的一只 前面空间大 砸盒 左右空间小 重物撞击感 上下也是闷闷的撞击感
figures.feelEn: It's a very thick one. There's a lot of room in the front. When you smash the box, there's a small space on the left and right. There's a feeling of impact from heavy objects. There's also a dull impact feeling up and down.

figures.name: 小弗兰
figures.feel: 左右打盒有声音 上下不打盒 但很空
figures.feelEn: There is a sound when opening boxes on the left and right, but there is no box opening on the top and bottom, but it is very empty.

figures.name: 灵魂吞噬者
figures.feel: 没有声音 小灵魂都是单独包装塞进去的 但是前后下方1/5处特别满 能摸到顶的点 100%
figures.feelEn: There is no sound. The little souls are packed and stuffed separately. However, the front and bottom 1/5 is particularly full. The point where you can touch the top is 100%.

figures.name: 隐形先生
figures.feel: 四周满 上下有空间 但是不怎么摇的动 配件撑的空间小
figures.feelEn: It’s full on all sides and there’s space up and down, but it doesn’t move very much and there’s little room for accessories.

figures.name: 孤独的骨架
figures.feel: 无空间 全满 但不顶 摇不动
figures.feelEn: No space, full, but not enough, unable to shake

figures.name: 小恶魔
figures.feel: 六面都特别轻 但四面砸盒
figures.feelEn: The six sides are very light, but the four sides are smashed.

figures.name: 木乃伊女士
figures.feel: 六面空 六面全砸盒 很重的砸盒感
figures.feelEn: Six sides are empty. All six sides are smashed into the box. A heavy box-smashing feeling.

figures.name: 快乐小丑
figures.feel: 又满又顶到侧面一个大顶点凸出来就是它
figures.feelEn: It's full and pushed up to the side, with a big peak protruding from it.

series.name: LABUBU THE MONSTER|横山宏系列
series.note: 新盒都是成双成对的 隐藏款应该是很空的可以到处晃的

figures.name: 紫石英
figures.feel: 这张是潮玩卡所有重一点
figures.feelEn: This is a trendy card and is heavier.

figures.name: 锈蚀
figures.feel: 左右没有空间 上下有一点距离可以晃动 正面labubu额头处可以捏到东西
figures.feelEn: There is no space on the left and right, but there is a little distance up and down so that you can move around. You can pinch something on the forehead of the labubu on the front.

figures.name: 薄暮
figures.feel: 侧边直接对顶出来到不行 侧面最中心的地方对顶凸出来 六面全满
figures.feelEn: The sides are directly facing each other and the center of the side is protruding from the top. All six sides are full.

figures.name: 火烈鸟
figures.feel: 很满很满的一对 左右微微一点空间 上下略有一点空间 左右很满无空间
figures.feelEn: A very full pair. There is a little space on the left and right. A little space on the top and bottom. Very full and no space on the left and right.

figures.name: 暴风
figures.feel: 上下略一点点空间 微微感受到上下摇动 正面从上往下四分之一处monster这个地方特别满
figures.feelEn: There is a little space up and down, and you can feel the up and down shaking slightly. The monster is a quarter of the way from top to bottom on the front, and this place is particularly full.

figures.name: 玄铁
figures.feel: 明盒 侧面两个面一个大的点出来 而不是顶点凸出来 上下还有空间可以摇动 特别明显
figures.feelEn: A bright box has a large dot protruding from the two sides instead of a protruding vertex. There is still room for shaking at the top and bottom, which is particularly obvious.

figures.name: 雪人
figures.feel: 明盒 侧面两个面一个大的点出来 而不是顶点凸出来 上下还有空间可以摇动 特别明显
figures.feelEn: A bright box has a large dot protruding from the two sides instead of a protruding vertex. There is still room for shaking at the top and bottom, which is particularly obvious.

figures.name: 赤焰
figures.feel: 红色略重是因为干燥剂更重一点
figures.feelEn: The red color is slightly heavier because the desiccant is heavier

figures.name: 旭日
figures.feel: 完全摇不动 没有一点空隙 但是没有一个顶点
figures.feelEn: It's completely unshakable, not a single gap, but not a single peak.

series.noteEn: New boxes come in pairs. The hidden box should be quite empty and can be moved around.
series.nameEn: LABUBU THE MONSTERS|Kow Yokoyama Ma.K. Series Figures

series.name: SKULLPANDA|明日早高峰系列
series.note: 干燥剂随机 重量仅供参考

figures.name: 从容等待
figures.feel: 没有顶点 不明显 编号6009
figures.feelEn: No vertices, not obvious, number 6009

figures.name: 惊喜特派
figures.feel: 正面封面车窗处有一个小点顶出来了 明盒 编号7678
figures.feelEn: There is a small dot sticking out of the car window on the front cover. Ming box number 7678

figures.name: 甜蜜来袭
figures.feel: 好轻的感觉 封面正中心摸下去会有塑料盒声音 其他没有特别的 编号8063
figures.feelEn: It feels so light. There is a plastic box sound when you touch the center of the cover. Nothing else special. No. 8063

figures.name: 急行的士
figures.feel: 封面车窗处顶盒 侧面下方四分之一处顶盒 很明显 编号1731
figures.feelEn: The top box at the cover window and the top box at the lower quarter of the side are obviously No. 1731

figures.name: 梦境飞行
figures.feel: 封面从上往下三分之一处靠右边特别满顶 一小块的满 封面下方轻轻一摸就有塑料盒的声音 编号6303
figures.feelEn: One third of the cover from the top to the bottom is particularly full on the right side. A small area is full. You can hear the sound of the plastic box when you touch the bottom of the cover. No. 6303

figures.name: 卡点冲鸭
figures.feel: 没有顶点 干燥剂声音小 左右动静大 编号8863
figures.feelEn: There is no vertex. The desiccant makes little noise and makes loud left and right movements. No. 8863

figures.name: 深海近道
figures.feel: 图鉴侧面下方五分之一处特别满 略顶 编号6396
figures.feelEn: The bottom fifth of the side of the illustrated book is particularly full, slightly at the top, No. 6396

figures.name: 重磅出街
figures.feel: 正面耳朵球图片这里特别顶 明盒 编号6111
figures.feelEn: The picture of the front ear ball is specially featured here. Ming box No. 6111

series.noteEn: Desiccant is supplied randomly and the weight is for reference only.

figures.name: 米丽甜豆
figures.feel: 六面都空 但是距离很小 六面都砸盒但是重量不集中 感受得到体积是比较大的
figures.feelEn: The six sides are empty, but the distance is very small. The six sides are smashed into the box, but the weight is not concentrated. You can feel that the volume is relatively large.

figures.name: 水滴甜豆
figures.feel: 六面全部空 都略砸盒 重量集中在中间
figures.feelEn: All six sides are empty and the box is slightly smashed. The weight is concentrated in the middle.

figures.name: 慕奇甜豆

figures.feelEn: There was the sound of two balls colliding, a very distinct sound of plastic hitting.

figures.name: 月兔RiCO&COCO
figures.feel: 上下左右空 但有一面很大盒 声音大 无内部碰撞声
figures.feelEn: The top, bottom, left, and right are empty, but one side is very large and the sound is loud. There is no internal collision sound.

figures.name: 宇宙Kancho&地球
figures.feel: 轻 摇盒时有配种币和球四周转动 很明显 两个球在转
figures.feelEn: When the box is shaken gently, the coins and balls will rotate around. It is obvious that the two balls are rotating.

figures.name: 银河毯RiCO
figures.feel: 只有配种币和他本身 晃动只感觉一块东西在动 没有其他东西 尤其左右晃动时 只有他一个东西的声音
figures.feelEn: There is only the breeding coin and himself. When shaking, I can only feel something moving. There is no other thing, especially when shaking left and right, the only sound is his.

figures.name: 隐藏款-摇滚之王
figures.feel: 最重最重最重最重 选最重的 准没错 左右上下空 有砸盒感 有一个小点特别顶
figures.feelEn: The heaviest, the heaviest, the heaviest, the heaviest. Choose the heaviest one. That’s right. It’s empty on the left, right, top and bottom. It feels like a box has been smashed. There is a small dot that stands out in particular.

figures.name: 键盘手
figures.feel: 上下不顶 略满 左右晃无声
figures.feelEn: Doesn’t lift up or down. Slightly full. Shakes left and right without sound.

figures.name: 小提琴家
figures.feel: 最轻 六面都空 都摇盒 轻
figures.feelEn: The lightest. All six sides are empty. All shake boxes are light.

figures.name: 沙锤手
figures.feel: 上下满感觉有阻碍 摇的动 前后左右空
figures.feelEn: There is a feeling of obstruction when moving up and down. It shakes. There is empty space in the front, back, left and right.

figures.name: 鼓手
figures.feel: 配件多 上下前后满 有一个点略顶
figures.feelEn: There are many accessories, including top, bottom and front. There is one point that is slightly top.

figures.name: 贝斯手
figures.feel: 上下左右空 感觉很轻的配种币 声很小
figures.feelEn: It is empty up, down, left and right. It feels very light. The sound is very small.

figures.name: 非洲鼓手
figures.feel: 上下左右略满 前后空 砸盒
figures.feelEn: Slightly full on the top, bottom, left, and right, empty on the front and back, smash the box

series.name: Nanci|二十四节气秋收冬藏系列
series.note: 隐藏款手感攻略：84.8g全套最重 其他款式都在80以内 上下左右前后六面很满 配重币是大薄片 没有任何声音 娃娃倒置在对角线 裙摆满 斗篷的角是凸起的会有顶盒的点

figures.name: 隐藏款
figures.feel: 全套最重 六面很满 配重币是大薄片 没有任何声音 娃娃是倒置在对角线 所以裙摆满 斗篷的角是凸起的 就会有顶盒的点出现 找到两个顶的点
figures.feelEn: The whole set is the heaviest, six sides are full, the weight coin is a large thin piece, there is no sound, the doll is upside down on the diagonal, so the skirt is full, the corners of the cloak are raised, and there will be points of the top box. Find the two top points.

series.noteEn: Guide to the feel of the hidden model: 84.8g is the heaviest in the whole set. All other styles are within 80. It is full on the top, bottom, left, right, and front sides. The weight coin is a large thin piece. There is no sound. The doll is upside down on the diagonal. The skirt is full. The corners of the cloak are raised and there are points for the top box.
series.nameEn: Nanci|Rolife Nanci 24 Solar Terms Autumn & Winter Series Figures

series.name: THE MONSTERS|一起圣诞系列

figures.name: 国王
figures.feel: 六面都空轻，六面都打盒上下声音小一点
figures.feelEn: All six sides are empty and light, and the up and down sound of the box on all six sides is smaller.

figures.name: 圣诞树
figures.feel: 唯一一个上下按住六面全满，只有卡片在摇晃的盲盒
figures.feelEn: The only blind box where all six sides are filled by pressing up and down, and only the cards are shaking.

figures.name: 胡桃夹子
figures.feel: 四面打盒，上下顶，唯一一个上下能按到顶的就是它
figures.feelEn: Make the box from four sides, top it up and down, the only thing that can be pressed up and down is it

figures.name: 雪橇
figures.feel: 上下空间大很沉的打盒，侧面四个面也打盒
figures.feelEn: The box is heavy and has large upper and lower space, and the four sides are also boxed.

figures.name: 圣诞天使
figures.feel: 四面有空间不打盒，上下闷闷声音的打盒
figures.feelEn: If there is space on all sides, the box will not open, but the sound will be muffled when the box is opened.

figures.name: 圣诞老人
figures.feel: 上下空间小但有清晰的卡片上下左右打盒的声音，左右空间很大且砸盒，前后面满
figures.feelEn: The upper and lower space is small but there is a clear sound of cards being boxed up, down, left and right. The left and right spaces are large and boxes are being hit. The front and back are full.

figures.name: 壁炉
figures.feel: 四面空间小，上下空间大但是很轻很轻，断层轻
figures.feelEn: The space on the four sides is small, the space above and below is large, but it is very light and has light faults.

series.nameEn: LABUBU THE MONSTERS|Christmas Together Series Figures

series.name: ShinWoo|秘密庄园系列

figures.name: 永恒停滞
figures.feel: 六面全部摇不动 但是很轻
figures.feelEn: It can't move on all six sides, but it's very light.

figures.name: 给你的信
figures.feel: 只有配重币在乱撞 上下摇的响
figures.feelEn: Only the weighted coins are bumping around and shaking up and down.

figures.name: 超负荷拥抱
figures.feel: 左右轻捏摇不动 上下有空间 不砸盒 但是不会左右乱晃
figures.feelEn: It won't shake with gentle pinching left and right. There is space up and down. It won't break the box but it won't shake around.

figures.name: 庄园怪盗
figures.feel: 下方三分之一处捏到对顶 上下一点点空间
figures.feelEn: Pinch the lower third to the top, leaving a little space above and below

figures.name: 困境迷宫
figures.feel: 上下有空间摇的动 左右空间小 轻捏会很紧但感受不到对顶
figures.feelEn: There is room for shaking up and down, but there is little left and right space. It will be very tight when pinched lightly, but you cannot feel the contact.

figures.name: 花的告别
figures.feel: 六面全空 左右几乎摇不动 上下配重币胡乱飞砸
figures.feelEn: All six sides are empty, and the left and right sides can hardly move. The upper and lower counterweight coins are flying randomly.

figures.name: 伤心园丁
figures.feel: 下方三分之一处很顶 上下可以摇的很响
figures.feelEn: The lower third is very high and can be shaken very loudly up and down.

figures.name: 秘密保险箱
figures.feel: 下方三分之一处捏到对顶 上下空间大 但不砸盒
figures.feelEn: Pinch the lower third to the top. There is plenty of space at the top and bottom, but the box will not be smashed.

figures.name: 好奇花匠
figures.feel: 下方三分之一处很顶 四面都对顶 轻捏都捏到 上下无空间
figures.feelEn: The lower third is very high, with all four sides facing each other. It can be pinched lightly, and there is no space above or below.

figures.name: 毒菇熊
figures.feel: 因为有配件分开的 卡的很紧 左右满 上下一点点空间
figures.feelEn: Because there are separate accessories, the card is very tight, leaving a little space on the top and bottom.

figures.name: 雏菊的答案
figures.feel: 下方三分之一处捏到对顶 上下有空间 但左右摇不动
figures.feelEn: Pinch the lower third to the top. There is space up and down, but you can't move it left or right.

figures.name: 秘密拼图
figures.feel: 捏不到 左右无空间 上下只有一点点空间
figures.feelEn: Can't pinch, no space left and right, only a little space up and down

series.nameEn: ShinWoo|The Secret Bear Garden Series Figures
